betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Memory§r is like the §6CPU§r, an essential part in all computers.

Depending on the CPU's architecture, the memory has a very essential effect on what a computer can and cannot do. For the standard Lua architecture, for example, it controls the actual amount of memory Lua scripts can use. This means that to run larger and more memory-intensive programs, you will need more memory.

Storage Drawers§r are an easy and cheap way of storing large amounts of items. They can be further upgraded to increase storage capacity as well as other abilities, such as voiding. They can also be §dChiseled§r to change their wood type.

§2Many drawers may cause lag.

Congratulations. You have done it. You have actually done it.

While the rest of the world clung desperately to their beef and their bread, you - yes, YOU - reached into your inventory, pulled out a §6Silkworm§r, and thought: "yes. This is food now." Klaus is proud. Klaus is, in fact, emotional. Somewhere in a Swiss
chalet, a single tear rolls down his turtleneck. You will own nothing. You will have no hunger bar. Und you will be happy.

The §3Stirling Engine§r uses heat from a §3Heating Oven§r or a §3§r§3Firebox§r to produce power. If a Heating Oven is used to heat a Stirling engine, it will likely over-speed and damage it, sending the main gear flying. The heavy Stirling engine does not have this issue.

A firebox running on coal with a stirling engine produces §e2kHE/s§r, while a heating oven with a heavy stirling engine produces §e10kHE/s§r.

The §6Central Processing Unit§r (CPU), is a core part for each computer or §6Server§r. It defines the architecture of the computer, and the number of components that can be connected to the computer before it stops working. 
Higher tier CPUs also provide a higher per-tick direct call limit to the computer - in simpler terms: better CPUs run faster.
The red planet, home to vast quantities of §6Iron§r. §6Molysite§r and §6Volcano Gems§r can be found here in basaltic caves, found within basins where vast oceans were theorized to once exist.
Need some advanced alloy? Buy some!
Mmm... turn on the grill. We need more meat.

The §3Steam Engine§r is an early game method of turning §bSteam§r into energy. It requires an external source to provide steam and a way to dump or reprocess the §bLow-Pressure Steam§r it produces. 

The Steam Engine has an energy efficiency of §e85%§r, making it better than the §3Stirling Engine§r. However, it still has a throughput limit as it can only hold up to 2000 mB of steam. Its maximum processing rate is 2000 mB/t, producing a considerable §e3400 HE/t§r or §e68 kHE/s§r. It is therefore the best generator available before §3Steam Surbines§r.

A boiler being heated up by a heating oven using coal will produce §e17kHE/s§r.

The §6Internet Card§r grants computers access to the internet. It provides ways to perform simple HTTP requests, as well as to open plain TCP client sockets that can be read and written to.

Installing an internet card in a computer will also attach a custom file system that contains a few internet related applications, such as one for downloading and uploading snippets from/to pastebin as well as a "wget" clone that allows downloading data from arbitrary HTTP URLs.

§3P2P ME§r can be used to transport massive amounts of channels without laying many cables.

§2This quest serves as a guide on how to effectively use P2P ME.§r

Once an §3Energy Acceptor§r has been set up, it is highly recommended (and likely needed) that an §3Energy Cell§r is placed next to it as to ensure that there is enough power going to the system, as more components increase the energy demands of the ME system.

After that, 2 §3ME Controllers§r are required, one to provide the channels that machines will use, and another to transport the other's channels by the P2P connections. The top controller can be made bigger by attaching more controllers next to it.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Controller1.png[/img]

After the controllers are placed, on the top controller, a P2P Tunnel - ME needs to be placed on any side. The §9Blue Cable§r will serve as the cable that connects the P2P connections, and as such, it needs to be connected to the bottom controller.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Controller2.png[/img]

By linking the P2P connections together using a §6Memory Card§r, the 32 channels from one side of the top controller will only use 1 channel from the bottom controller to be transported to any destination. The §cRed Cable§r now has access to 32 channels.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Controller3.png[/img]

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Controller4.png[/img]

By expanding on the previous example, more connections can be added to fully utilize all channels.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Controller5.png[/img]

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_controller6.png[/img]

Parallelisation of processes can significantly cut down on waiting time and as such it is highly recommended that P2P Interfaces are used.

§2This quest serves as a guide on how to use P2P Interfaces.§r

As any P2P Connection goes, there needs to be one input, which in this case, holds the §6ME Patterns§r.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_P2P_Interface1.png[/img]

After patterns are inserted in the first P2P interface, place down the rest of the output interfaces you want and link them together using a §6Memory Card§r.

In the image below, the P2P interface highlighted in green stores the patterns, while the ones in blue, are the output ones which will connect machines to the ME system.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_P2P_Interface2.png[/img]

Make sure to have blocking mode enabled on all output P2P interfaces as to prevent clogging and having multiple recipes trying to be executed at once in the same machine.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_P2P_Interface3.png[/img]

Finally, place your desired machines at the output P2P interfaces and add a way of retrieving the items once the operation is done, in this case import buses.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_P2P_Interface4.png[/img]

The §3Plasma Forge§r is a large and advanced assembler that requires a running fusion reactor to work. It can weld plates at twice the speed of a normal welder. It does not accept upgrades, however, it can use up otherwise useless fission fragments and unstable isotopes to gain a temporary §ex4§r speed bonus with no penalty.

The §3ICF§r can process different combinations of fuels at different laser power levels. A cheap and renewable fuel that can be used to gather the §bStellar Flux§r needed for §6Gerald§r and make decent power is §bHelium-4 - Hydrogen§r.

Applying a Muon Particle to a fuel pellet will decrease the power that is needed to run it.

The §3Gas Centrifuge§r is used to centrifuge §bUranium/Plutonium Hexafluoride§r to obtain enriched fuel for bombs and reactor fuel.

Two gas centrifuges in a row will yield §6Uranium-238§r and §6Uranium Fuel§r used in reactors. The uranium hexafluoride processing line does not consume the §6Sulfur§r and §6Fluorite§r, so loops are recommended.

The §6Gas Centrifuge Overclocking Upgrade§r is needed to obtain §6Uranium-235§r. Four gas centrifuges will have to be placed in a row and the upgrade on the last of them to obtain uranium-235 nuggets.

[F1] For more information.
"Zombie Pigman"? What the hell is going on with you zombies?! Maybe you should encase your animals better at night...
The §3Armor Modification Table§r allows for armor modifications to be inserted in armor, giving either buffs, new abilities or extra resistance.

§3Dyson Swarms§r consist of thousands of swarm members encircling the parent star of a system, and energy production from the swarm scales based on the number of members in a swarm. These satellites do not last indefinitely however, they attenuate (decay) over time, with the chance of decay increasing as the number of swarm members increase.

§6Dyson Swarm Members§r must be launched into solar orbit via the use of a huge centrifugal launch platform, known as the §3Spinlauncher§r. The spinlauncher launches 4 swarm members at a time, consuming a large amount of electricity to do so.

The §3Dyson Receiver§r is the main machine required for collecting energy from the swarm. It collimates the immense energy collected from the swarm into a immensely powerful beam. Setting up requires only a satellite ID chip that is matched to an existing swarm. The energy beam must be pointed towards a Dyson Power Converter.

The §3Satellite Dyson Relay§r can be used to allow dyson swarms to provide power during night time.

§6CMB Iserts§r are an armor modification which will protect its user from the corrosive atmosphere of §eEve§r. 

The §3Gas Giant Harvester§r will return back with §bJool Air§r, to be processed by the §3Cryogenic Distillation Machine§r.
The §6Transistor§r is one of the most basic crafting ingredients in OC. It is mainly used to craft §6Microchips§r and other electronic goods.

[warn]This version of the Questbook was originally made by _SkippyPlaysMC_ and modified by Bufka2011.[/warn]

Notes:

§b1) This questbook does not contain all the content from the mod, such as the guns, many armor sets and others. Make sure to browse NEI.

2) §lThere are two types of quests §r§3§b- primary and secondary. Primary quests are quests with unique shape and bold lines between each other.

3) When updating the modpack to newer versions that has introduced changes to the questbook, in case the quests dont update, delete the betterquesting folder in the world file.
After it is deleted, turn on cheats and do "/bq_admin edit true", head over to the chapter of your choice, press the designer button (the one with many squares), click on your quest of choice and finally press the autocomplete button (checkmark) to complete the quests previously completed.

§c§lDo not use the quests for a modpack that is to be published, unless given explicit permission.

§r§bSpecial thanks to everyone on discord who helped out with questions and recommendations while making the quests, as well as the official NTM Wiki for providing information used in the quests.
The §3ME IO Port§r can transfer the contents of storage cells into an ME Network and back.
The §3Industrial Greenhouse§r converts §bCarbon Dioxide§r into §bOxygen§r via crop growth. The greenhouse can also be supplied with §6Fertilizer§r for faster growing.

Structures generate throughout the world and are among the best sources of early-game resources. Raiding them before investing heavily in production can save significant time and materials.

§2Exploration pays off early - check your surroundings before grinding for resources you might find for free.§r

The §3Battery Socket§r is used to hold §6Batteries§r or §6Capacitors§r.

Batteries have more energy storage, but a slower discharge time, meaning that only a small amount of stored power can be outputted to the grid.

Capacitors on the other hand, have less energy storage, but a faster discharge time.

§3Spatial IO§r is a way to cut-and-paste physical volumes of space in your world. It works by swapping the defined volume with an identically-sized volume in the spatial storage dimension, sending whatever's in the pylon array to the spatial storage dimension, and whatever's in the dimension to the pylon array.

Spatial IO requires a specific arrangement of its components in order to function, and define the volume to be cut-and-pasted. All of the components must be on the same network in order to function, and you can have only one spatial IO setup on a network. Thus, a subnetwork is recommended.

The §3Spatial IO Port§r controls the spatial IO operation. It shows stats on the multiblock setup, and holds the spatial cells

To perform a spatial IO operation, place a §6Spatial Storage Cell§r in the input slot and give the spatial IO port a redstone pulse. It will then swap the volume in the pylons with the volume in the spatial storage dimension. This means that if you send some set of blocks to the spatial storage dimension, then put another set of blocks in the pylons, put the cell back in the input slot, and trigger the IO port again, the 2nd set of blocks will disappear and the 1st set of blcks will reappear.

Any entity in the defined volume, including you, will be carried along, and if you have no way of getting out, you will be trapped in the spatial storage dimension.

§3Spatial Pylons§r are the main part of a spatial IO setup, and define the volume to be affected. The volume is defined by the bounding box of the outside of the pylons, contracted in by 1 block in all directions.

§cWelcome to Nuclear Tech: New Horizons!§r

Please read the following information before starting out.

§b1) Remember to Claim your base and Chunkload your reactors using Server Utilities (from the inventory).

2) If shaders are glitching out try to use fancy textures.

3) If you are encountering any rendering problems, try to scroll around in NEI.

4) If you are playing with friends, make sure to invite them in your BetterQuesting Party as to share progression and rewards.
§6Microchips§r are the bread and butter of electronic component crafting. They come in different tiers, for crafting different tiers of components.

Welcome to the Stone Age. This stage covers the essential survival mechanics you will need to progress, as well as several changes made to vanilla Minecraft that affect how you play from the very beginning.

Work through the quests in this chapter to get up to speed before moving on.

§2Complete these quests before progressing - later stages assume you know this material.§r

The §3Dyson Anatmogenesis Terraformer§r provides the most utility out of all the currently available §3Dyson converters§r, accepting a beam from a receiver and providing a direct energy to mass conversion, producing planetary scale atmospheric gases, terraforming any planet or moon as a player sees fit.

By default it will release oxygen into an atmosphere, making it breathable once it crosses the 0.1atm threshold for breathing. A fluid identifier can be used to switch the gas emitted, and a screwdriver can switch it between emitting or extracting gases from the atmosphere.

If powered with §e150THE/s§r power from a swarm (equivalent to a swarm size of 1,024), it will take 8 hours to reach 0.1atm of pressure.

The §6Hammer§r is a tool from §dEx Nihilo§r used to crush blocks down into finer forms. Its primary role is producing the materials needed for the §3Sieve§r: cobblestone is crushed into gravel, gravel into sand, and sand into dust, each of which can be sieved for different resources.

To use it, simply break a target block with the §6Hammer§r as you would with a pickaxe. Hammers come in the standard tool tiers -
wood through diamond - and differ only in durability. They can be enchanted, though the available enchantments differ from those on a pickaxe.

Ores can also be hammered down through a multi-step crushing chain. Each step has a small chance to yield bonus
material, making the §6Hammer§r a basic form of ore multiplication before dedicated processing machines are available.

§2Hammering can be automated with machines that simulate block breaking, such as the Auto Hammer from §dEx Compressum§r.
§2Check JEI for the full crushing chain of any block.
I think I need a new backpack. Let's slaughter a few cows.

The §3Disk Drive§r can be used to read §6Floppy Disks§r using a computer connected to it.

This is useful to get started, since the lower tier §3Computer Cases§r do not have a built-in floppy slot, and you'll need an operating system to boot up the computer.
The §6Card Base§r is a common crafting material for card components in OC, such as §6Graphics Cards§r and §6Network Cards§r.
I hate dust!

The §3Electronic Assembler§r is an advanded workstation that can be used to build more complex electronic devices, such as §3Robots§r, §3Drones§r and §6Tablets§r. 

They require a large amount of energy to assemble devices, so it is recommended to power them sufficiently with a §3Capacitor Bank§r.

The §3Cryogenic Distillation Machine§r can split atmospheric gases into 4 useful fractions, like for example, taking trace amounts of §bNitrogen§r out of the Dunaian atmosphere to produce soil for planting crops.
With the §3Spent Fuel Pool Drum§r to cool down §3ZIRNOX§r or §3PWR§r depleted nuclear fuel and the §3PUREX§r to further process them, many new materials are now available.

The §6Wireless Network Card§r is an upgraded §6Network Card§r that can send and receive wireless network messages.
 
Tier two cards can also send and receive wired messages. The signal strength directly controls the distance up to which a sent message can be received, where the strength is equal to the distance in blocks.

The §3Fusion Reactor§r is a large, expensive, and advanced reactor type that runs by fusing various plasma types to generate heat.

The main part of the fusion reactor, the §3"Torus"§r, features four connecting ports for external components. It requires electricity and §bPerfluoromethyl§r cooling to operate.

The §3Klystron§r is the main power source of the fusion reactor, which uses electricity and compressed air, to generate input energy, §eKyU§r, for the connected torus. It will throttle if the buffered electricity or compressed air falls below §e50%§r, and if it falls below the torus' required input level, the plasma will extinguish.

The different plasma types also generate different useful byproducts and differing levels of neutron flux for breeding bulk quantities of materials, such as §6Lithium§r into §6Tritium§r.

Welding the coils will require a §6Blowtorch§r or an §6Acetylene Welding Torch§r.

§2For the additional components and power generation methods, please check out the two quests below.§r
Witches bring stitches because they are always infernal and very dangerous. Be careful since they throw potions at you.

§6Balefire§r is an extremely radioactive substance which can be used to make powerful fuels for the §3RBMK§r, aswell as §bBF Rocket Fuel§r for power production. High radiation resistant equipment is needed to hold the item. §6Thermonuclear Ashes§r can be produced sustainably as a byproduct from §bAntimatter - BF Rocket Fuel§r.

The High-Tech Bomb Defusing Device can extract balefire shards from duds.
Be meaner.

The §3Chemical Factory§r is a large version of the §3Chemical Plant§r, capable of performing 4 recipes in parallel. It has double the speed of the chemical plant but consumes twice as much power. Additionally, it consumes §bWater§r as a coolant, and produces §bLow-Pressure Steam§r, so a closed water cycle is recommended.

The §3Assembly Factory§r is a large version of the §3Assembly Machine§r, capable of performing 4 recipes in parallel. It functions the same as the chemical factory.
Trade three LV1 lootbags to get a better one: LV2.
§6Bauxide§r and §6Cryolite§r can be further processed to obtain §6Aluminium§r, with additional byproducts of §6Iron§r, §6Titanium§r and §bMercury§r.
Maskman is first NTM boss. To summon it, you should be under radiation poisoning (50 rad). Just wait for him to arrive.

The §3Teleporter§r can be used to teleport players, and entities in general, to a specific location.

Right-click a block with the §6Telelinker§r to set the desired exit position, then shift-click the teleporter with the telelinker to configure the teleporter.

§2The teleporter is a one way trip so it is advised that multiple are made.

Interdimensional teleportation using teleporters requires a very expensive type of fuel, so it is recommended that other teleportations methods are used, such as AE2 Spatial.

The §6Starmetal Pickaxe§r is used as a crafting component for the §6Molten§r and §6Bismuth Pickaxes§r, both being unbreakable and having a lot of abilities. Additionally, both can be used to mine §eDepth Rock§r.

§dOpenComputers§r is a very useful mod which will let one automate many processes which normaly couldnt be done even with an ME system.

Make sure to always check the §6OC Manual§r as it provides additional information of stuff that the quest book doesnt cover.

§6Cadmium§r is a material needed to make §6Cadmium Stee§rl, which is a substitute of §6Technetium Steel§r.

Cadmium can be obtained by smelting cadmium powder, which can be obtained acidizing 10 §6Mustard Willow leaves§r with 250mB of §bHigh-Perfomance Solvent§r in the §3Ore Acidizer§r.

The mustard willow is a plant that can be found near §eBedrock Oil Deposits§r. When it's fully matured, the main item can be obtained, that being the mustard willow leaf.

The §6Cable Network Analysis Tool§r is used to check the integrity of power grids and analyze their main functional components. To perform a test, right-click the analyzer on wires or mechanisms in the power grid. The device displays the following data:

§eLinks§r - these include wires and mechanisms that can conduct energy (e.g., energy storage units, utility poles).

§cProviders§r - all mechanisms capable of producing energy and/or feeding it into the grid (energy storage units in "§agreen§r" and "§6orange§r" modes, turbines, etc.).

§9Receivers§r - everything that absorbs energy from the grid (energy storage units in "§9blue§r" mode, grinders, and other mechanisms).

§2The analyzer not only displays the above components but also counts them. Each grid is assigned a unique code.

Particles only spawn in a 20 block radius!
Temporarily increases gravity on low gravity worlds when holding crouch.
§3Pipe Anchors§r are non solid fluid ducts which can be used instead of normal ducts.

With the §6§3Automatic Buzz Saw§r one can automatically farm trees for their §6Wood§r, aswell as other crops such as §6Hemp§r and §6Wheat§r.

§3Fans§r, when powered by redstone, can be used to push the dropped items into hoppers or conveyors for storage. Use a §6Drill§r on them to remove the diminishing pushing range.
The §3High-Power Steam Condenser§r is the a steam condenser which runs on electricity. It processes up to 60 mB/t of §bLow-Pressure Steam§r.
The §3Industrial Mixer§r is a machine that is used to mix a fluid with an item and/or another fluid. It can be used instead of a §3Chemical Plant§r for some recipes.

The §3Leviathan Steam Turbine§r is a massive turbine capable of processing gargantuan amounts of §bSteam§r at once, only hindered by the fluid system's transfer rate. It is significantly more powerful than even the §3Industrial Steam Turbine§r in terms of raw steam processing power. This turbine runs on §e85%§r Efficiency, so it is recommended that only 1-2 are used for very large reactors.

The §3Cyclotron§r is a machine that bombards element powders with element boxes to get heavier elements. Operating the machine will consume§e 20MHE/s§r.

It can also create §bAntimatter§r as a byproduct for certain operations, which makes it a reliable but expensive method of large-scale advanced material production.

§2Consider installing the highest level of Power Saving and Speed upgrades to reduce both recipe time and power consumption.§r
Particles are important items required to create exotic materials which are needed for most of the endgame content.

The §3RBMK§r is a modular boiling-water type nuclear fission reactor which consists entirely of concrete columns. Each of these columns is either blank or has a specific function that it performs such as holding fuel rods, moderating neutrons, or storing §bWater§r to be boiled into §bSteam§r. Each column will also exchange heat with the column next to it such that temperature differences between columns will gradually equalize within the reactor. If any column reaches §e1500°C§r, the reactor will explode incredibly violently, spraying scrap and immensely radioactive material in every direction.

Due to the complex and expansive nature of the RBMK, it is highly recommend that the wiki is checked out as it provides more information.

[url]https://nucleartech.wiki/wiki/RBMK[/url]

§2This quest provides an optional retrieval task for a cheap and safe RBMK design which can produce High-Performance Solvent§r §2without cooling. Simply Place the RBMK Irradiation Channel next to the RBMK Fuel Rod, apply the covers on the collumns and surround them with a solid block.

§3Anvils§r are a tiered crafting station that allows for the creation of various machines, structures, and items in some cases. There are multiple tiers of anvils with greater anvil tier primarily corresponding to a greater quantity of recipes being available.

The §3Presses§r are machines that can be used to make §6Plates§r, §6Wires§r, §6Circuits§r, §6Bullet Casings§r as well as §6Compressing§r non-smeltable powders back into their normal form. They require §6Stamps§r to work, which can be made from the basic §6Flat Stamp§r on the §6Iron Anvil§r.

§2A preheater can be placed next to the Burner Press to increase its speed.

§6Glyphids§r are large insects that have many different types. They primarily spawn with naturally generated §6§rhives§r structures. All of the types are armored and they take less damage than against normal mobs. Glyphids are normally attracted to pollution created by the player, and usually have to be dealt with by the player.

§6§r§6Hives§r can spawn naturally in all non-ocean biomes and can also be created by glyphid scouts. They contain several glyphid egg blocks and some low-tier loot inside, lying on top of eggs. glyphid egg blocks spawn glyphids and drop glyphid eggs upon destruction.

§2It is recommended that all hives are destroyed as soon as possible as to prevent their spread later on.

§6Technetium/Cadmium Steel§r is a steel based alloy mixed with technetium-99/Cadmium which has extreme corrosion resistance. It is frequently used in the late-game and acts as one of the main material gates of the §3Fusion§r and §3Watz§r powerplant.

There are many tools which will help you progress through the mod, the most important ones being:

§6Tungsten Reachers§r, which reduce the radiation the player gets exposed to from items in their inventory, as well as allowing them to hold some very hot items.

The §6Crowbar§r, which is used to open crates for loot such as food and ammunition found in various structures.

The §3Blast Furnace§r is a solid fuel-powered furnace used to create different alloys out of two inputs. The main starter alloys are: §6Minecraft Grade Copper§r, §6Steel§r and §6Advanced Alloy§r, which is a combination of the former.

Advanced alloy can be used to construct very durable tools that come with vein mining.

A separate block, the §3Blast Furnace Extension§r, can be placed on top of the blast furnace to make it operate faster. Without the extension, it smelts items at about half the rate of a furnace, the extension triples that rate. Fuel consumption remains constant, meaning the extension also triples the efficiency of fuel consumption. 

§2For more advanced tools later on, pressing the ALT key will bring up a menu from which one can select multiple abilities at once.

The §2§3PWR§r is a modular fission reactor. It is more limited than the §3RBMK§r in terms of capability and fuel types but it is much safer and easier to use due to it melting down more gently and being far more stable in its operation.

Due to the complex and expansive nature of the PWR, it is highly recommend that the wiki is checked out as it provides more information.

[url]https://nucleartech.wiki/wiki/PWR[/url]

§2This quest demands the most essential parts of a PWR, and does not represent the amount needed for a functioning reactor. There are also many other types of PWR Components that can be used.
§6Desh Servos§r are an armor modification which give incredibely strong buffs when used, such as increased strength, mining speed and jump boost.

The §6Trench Mask§r is a basic mask that will protect the user from some dangerous airborne particles while mining. To craft one you must first obtain §6Cloth§r and then piss on it by right clicking while holding it.

§2String can be easily obtained by harvesting Hemp, found in the wild.

§rI hate to say it, but you are basically sniffing your own piss...

§bReformate§r is a product of §bCrude Oil§r obtained via a §3Vacuum Refinery§r or from processing §bNaptha§r in a §3Hydrotreater§r.

§2This step can be skipped if making Jet Fuel and BTX using a Hydrotreater.

The §6M1TTY Environment Suit§r is a cheap electric armor set that comes with many abilities. It is an excellent armor set for exploring as it comes with very high speed buffs as well as fast swimming speed.

§6Hazmat Suits§r provide protection against many hazards, mainly radiation. §6Hazmat Cloth§r can be further strengthened to create more resistant hazmat suits.

To provide additional protection against environmental dangers, a §6Gas Mask Filter§r is needed, which can be equiped by right-clicking while holding it.

The most basic block for transmission is the §3Red Copper Cable§r, which comes in two varieties, a block form and a skinnier cable form. The block form also has a paintable version which can help it blend into your designs better.

For better looking, as well as longer distance energy transportation, a §l§r§6Cable Drum§r with §3Electricity Connectors§r can be used. These powerlines are non solid and can also pass through floors and walls.

The §6Pollution Detector§r will monitor and show the levels of pollution present in the environment. High levels of pollution will decrease the visibility, give debuffs to the player and buff mobs, including skeletons spawning with firearms.

§dHBM's NTM§r is an industrial mod, so you'll need §eelectricity§r to continue your journey. The energy is measured in §6HE (HBM Energy)§r.

§2If the wood-burning generator is not enough, more advanced energy sources can be unlocked on the left side of this questbook, such as the §3Stirling Engine§2, §3Solar Tower Boiler§2, or §3Radial Performance Engine§2.§r

The §6Analog Circuit§r is the first true circuit board used in crafting certain essential machines and tools such as the §6Oil Deposit Detector§r, the §3Chemical Plant§r, and the §3Electric Arc Furnace§r.

§2A cheaper recipe for Capacitors will be available if a Shredder is owned.

The §6Quantum Computer§r is the most powerful out of any other control unit. It currently only used to build §6Gerald§r. 

§2A whole stack of them will be required, so now would be the time to upgrade circuit crafting infrastructure.
The §6Solid State Quantum Processor§r is the first quantum circuit related component needed to make §6Quantum Processing Units§r and §6Quantum Computers§r.

The §3Assembly Machine§r is used in every stage of the game, with it being used to manufacture practically every other complex machine. Recipes for it can be chosen inside the GUI.

§2Some unique recipes require blueprints, that can be found in dungeons and/or bought from Bobmazon.

The §3Shredder§r is a machine that shreds resourses into their powder form, or in many cases, their crafting materials. It can also be used to double ores.

§2Shredder blades are required in order for the machine to work.

§bAntimatter§r is a dangerous substance which can be obtained from a §3Cyclotron§r or a §3Particle Accelerator§r. If dropped on the floor a violent explosion will occur. Antimatter cant be stored in normal tanks, and as such, a §3Magnetic Antimatter Container§r is required.
The §3Soldering Station§r is the machine in which §6§rcircuit components§r can be combined§6§r into §6Circuits§r and where §6Machine Upgrades§r can be created.

The §3Crucible§r is an important machine as it is the central component of metallurgy. It is used as a method of ore processing, alloying, and metal casting. It requires an external heat source to melt the inputs into liquids and when filled, it emits a consistent amount of soot that can cause a fair amount of pollution that cannot be mitigated. Some alloys, as mentioned before, can be made alternatively using a §3Blast Furnace§r, however this is generally slower.

[F1] For more information.

The §3Electric Arc Furnace§r is a large automated furnace multiblock machine that can fill the role of §3Crucible§r and automated smelter, and is required for progression as it is the only machine that can produce §6Silicon§r from various sources, such as §6Sand§r, §6Flint§r, §6fiberglass§r, and §6Asbestos§r.

To operate this machine, it will require both electrical power and crafted §7§6Electrodes§r. In terms of electricity, the machine has a maximum storage capacity of §e2.5MHE§r, and consumes §e20kHE/s§r in operation, making it reasonably power hungry. In terms of the electrodes required for operation, there are four types available, and the machine must have three installed before it can operate.

This machine can operate in two different modes: Solid mode, which is the easiest to setup and use, great for initial crafting, and Liquid mode, which produces castable molten ores much like the crucible, with a small bonus to output, increasing efficiency of extraction from various ores.
The §3Arc Welder§r is a machine needed for the creation of many components, such as §6Welded Plates§r, §6Missile Parts§r and more. Some Recipes will require a fluid inserted into the welder to work.

The §6Integrated Circuit Board§r is the first circuit board to use §6Silicon§r, being used extensively in mid game machines, automation devices, missiles, and various small tools such as the §6Geiger Counter§r.

The §3Combination Oven§r is a unique type of furnace that transforms items into their respective product and produce liquid byproducts. It can be used to produce §6Coke§r, §bWood Oil§r and §6Aluminium§r more efficiently.

The §3Chemical Plant§r is a machine needed for several processes, turning fluids into other fluids, synthesis of different compounds, ect. Like the §3Assembly Machine§r, recipes can be selected entirely within the GUI.
The §6Military Grade Circuit Board§r is an advanced Circuit Board used in more complicated machines, such as the §3Gas Centrifuge§r.
The §3Strand Caster§r is a large basin that can cast items in batches of 9. It also requires §bWater§r in order to cast, where it makes §bLow-Pressure Steam§r that can be turned back into water.
High-speed steel§r is an advanced and specialized form of standard steel. It used in many recipes, such as the §3Oil Derrick§r and the §3Industrial Mixer§r.
§6Starmetal§r is a unique alloy made from combining §6Saturnite§r with §6Meteorite Powder§r in a §3Blast Furnace§r.

The §6Versatile Integrated Circuit§r is the first circuit to use §6Bismuth/Arsenic§r. It is used in more advanced machines such as the §3Vacuum Refinery§r and is one of the main components of §6Versatile Circuit Boards§r.

The §6Impact Drill§r is an electric pickaxe which has prebuilt enchantments and abilities on it. It is a very useful tool which will make mining way more efficient.

Similar electric tools exist for the axe and shovel.

§3Conveyors§r provide the simplest way of moving items around. There are multiple blocks that can interface with machines as well as items moving along conveyor belts.

§3Conveyor Belts§r are blocks used to transport items. They can pick up dropped items or items from conveyor ejectors. Conveyor inserters can take items from conveyor belts. If there are no conveyor inserters present, the item will be dropped at the end of the conveyor belt line.

§3Conveyor Inserters§r are blocks that take items from conveyor belts and outputs them into a storage space. Conveyor ejectors are the opposite, they take items from storage and place them onto conveyor belts. 

Inserters have an option to destroy surplus items if the input buffer has run full, otherwise the items that can neither be inserted in the target nor the inserter's buffer is simply dropped.

The ejector has a whitelist/blacklist system (the default mode is blacklist with no restrictions - this means that everything will go through). Rick-clicking the white arrow will toggle between whitelist and blacklist. An item can be added to the blacklist/whitelist by "depositing" it into the blue inventory square - the item will not be consumed, however.

The §3Conveyor Splitter§r is a type of conveyor belt that splits items evenly onto 2 lanes.

§3Conveyor Sorters§r are blocks that can sort various items to a specific conveyor belt. They do not have a buffer and simple move items to connected conveyor belts based on their filter options, therefore they can sort items as quickly as they receive them.
The sorter has six outputs with five slots each, making it able to route multiple items to one belt.

The §3Oil Derrick§r extracts §bCrude Oil§r and §6§bNatural Gas§r from §eOil Deposits§r that are directly below them. When supplied with power, it will begin to drill downwards until it cannot drill further or reach an oil deposit. Upon reaching a deposit, it will continuously extract oil and gas from it until the deposit is entirely depleted.

§eBedrock Ore Deposits§r are an infinite source of resourses which can be obtained by using a §3Large Mining Drill§r and a §3Bedrock Ore Processor§r.

Operating the drill will consume§e 200kHE/s§r.

Before excavation can happen, the §eDepth Rock§r covering the bedrock ore deposit needs to be removed. An easy way of doing that is blowing up the rock with §6Mining Charges§r.

The large mining drill is used to excavate §6Raw Bedrock Ores§r from their deposits. The drill requires a §6Drillbit§r to work§r, which can be upgraded to increase the speed at which it operates at. §eFortune§r on a drillbit affects the quality of mined bedrock ore, each level of fortune adds §e10%§r of the value to the item.

The bedrock ore processor takes §6§rraw bedrock ore obtained from the drill and breaks it down into smaller pieces, each with different products that can be obtained from them. 
§a§bOre Slop§r, which is created when the machine is operating, can be processed into many useful products, especially when it is sent through an §3Electrolysis Machine§r.

The §6Bedrock Ore Desity Scanner§r shows information on the composition of Bedrock Ore deposits.

Bedrock ore processing can be both an energy and resourse expensive operation so it is recommended that it is explored after having good infrastructure.

§2Consider adding a Power Saving Upgrade to the drill as it only reduces power without affecting the mining speed. Additionally, installing an Effectiveness Upgrade on the ore slopper will make it give out more resourses.§r§r

Incase of an §3RBMK§r meltdown, §6Fuel Chunks§r will be thrown near the reactor. The §6Liquidator Medal§r is an armor modification which passively reduces radiation, making it very useful when handling radioactive items or venturing into irradiated areas.

Before §bCrude Oil§r can be processed, it must be heated up in a §3Boiler§r.

The §3Oil Refinery§r splits Hot Crude Oil(or later on §bCracked§r) into four different fluid products and one solid byproduct.

After that, those fluids can be sent through a §3Fractioning Tower§r to obtain different kinds of fuels, such as §bKerosene§r and §bDiesel§r. A §3Fractioning Tower Seperator§r can be used to stack fractioning towers ontop of eachother.

The §6Versatile Circuit Board§r is the final tier of circuit board, requiring §6Bismuth/Arsenic§r and §6Hard Plastic/PVC Bars§r.  As well as this, it is by far the most expensive circuit board, requiring nearly 55 insulators to craft a single one. Used rarely but in small amounts in advanced machines like the §3Fusion Reactor§r and in large amounts in components for the §3ICF Reactor§r.
The §6Settings Tool§r is used to copy settings of machines. It is especially useful when making large refineries.

§6Hard Plastic/PVC Bars§r are very durable plastics needed for many late game recipes. 

§2Both can be used in the same recipes.

The §6DNT Nanosuit§r is final goal of the mod. By crafting this armor you have reached the end of progression.

§5Thanks for playing!

The §3Pyrolysis Oven§r is a mid-to-late game oil processing machine that allows easier production pf §6Crystalline Fullerite§r, which is needed in bulk for late-game machines onwards. 

It can process an item with an optional fluid to produce another item and/or fluid. Functionally, it works similar to the §3Combination Oven§r, mostly in bedrock ore processing.
Its main use however is in production of §6Fullerene§r, as it can turn §6Tar§r into §6Fine Soot§r, eliminating the RNG of a §3Smokestack§r.

Operating the pyrolysis oven will consume §e200kHE/s§r.

The §3DFC§r is the last reactor of the mod and as such is very expensive to craft. Apart from the DFC parts, two §6Catalysts§r are needed for the reactor to work.

It is recommended that the wiki is checked out.

[url]https://nucleartech.wiki/wiki/DFC[/url]

Exploration is an important part of the §dNTM§r experience as salvaging abandoned structures is a viable strategy for early game. Large caverns also exist in this modpack, so dont hesistate going caving.

§dBackpacks§r will be a massive help, as they can be used to carry around more loot. Crates can also be used to transport items, but backpacks also come packed with dedicated tool slots, a crafting table, a bed aswell as fluid tanks.

A §6Hose§r can be used to quickly input and output fluids stored in the backpack.

§2Iron Backpacks will be removed next update so if you still use them, please empty them.
§6Polymer§r is a basic plastic material needed for many recipes. Important uses of it are the §3Centrifuge§r, the §3Catalytic Cracking Tower§r and the §3Electric Arc Furnace§r.
The §3Catalytic Cracking Tower§r is a large oil processing multiblock machine which produces many fluids, such as §bAromatic Hydrocarbons§r used for §6Bakelite§r.

An upgraded version of the §3Anvil§r, [T3], which unlocks additional recipes.

Alternatively, the §3Desh Anvil§r can be skipped by making a §3Ferrouranium Anvil§r, [T4], from scavanged §e§r§6Uranium-238§r found in structures.

The §3Rotary Furnace§r is a large furnace which is powered by both §bSteam§r and §6§rsolid fuel. §rIt outputs molten material which can be cast similarly to the outputs of the §3Crucible§r and §3Arc Furnace§r. The Rotary Furnace is the only machine that can produce §6Saturnite§r and §6Weapon Steel§r.
§bReformate Gas§r is used in welding very durable materials, as well as used in making §6Saturnite§r.
The §3Industrial Boiler§r is an upgraded version of the Boiler which has a higher capacity of held liquid. Additionally, it doesnt explode.

§6Rubber§r is an essential material used in many crafting recipes. It is created in a §3Chemical Plant§r with §bUnsaturated Hydrocarbons§r obtained from a §3Catalytic Cracking Tower§r.

§6Latex§r is a rubber alternative which can be used in some recipes instead of normal rubber. It can be created early on using a §3Burner Press§r by processing dandelions or jungle wood.

§2In NTM: Space cracked oil is required to obtain the first piece of rubber.

§6Bakelite§r is an alternative to Polymer and can be used for the same recipes. Since it doesnt require any §6Coal Powder§r or §6Fluorite§r to be made, it is easier and more convenient to automate than §6Polymer§r.

§6Desh§r is an alloy made up of 9 rare earth metals to make its blend form, which is solidified and refined using §bMercury§r and §bLight oil§r in the §3Chemical Plant§r. Desh is an almost unbreakable material and as such its tools have infinite durability. 

§a§2Desh can also be made using DeshReady™ in a Rotary Furnace, or later on, in an Ore Acidizer.§r

Mercury at this stage of the game can be obtained from centrifuging §eRedstone Ore§r or putting §eCinnabar§r in a §3Combination Oven§r. Large cinnabar veins can be found as depth ore.

Later on, mercury can be obtained from processing §bOre Slop§r or §bVitriol§r in an §3Electrolyzer§r.

The §3FEL§r or Free Electron Laser is a large multiblock utilized with the SILEX to produce various laser wavelengths needed for all SILEX recipes.

A single FEL can power up to 5 SILEX'es. In order to stop the laser any concrete block can be in the its path.

The lower the wavelength of the crystal, the faster recipes will be completed.

The §6§3SILEX§r is a machine that separates isotopes and elements from compounds or other materials via the SILEX (Separation of Isotopes by Laser Exitation) process. It allows for easier enrichment of §6Uranium§r, §6Plutonium§r, and §6Australium§r.

The SILEX can also process §6Lapis Lazuli§r into §6Sulfur§r, §6Aluminium§r, and most importantly §6Cobalt§r. It can use §bHydrogen Peroxide§r to liquify any material to be processed, the material may even be in a powder state. The processed items come out into the right side collection of slots.

The SILEX must be placed at least 2 blocks away from activated FEL laser, or else its going to melt.

The §3Industrial Steam Turbine§r is a multiblock machine that is a much larger and more powerful version of the regular §3Steam Turbine§r. It has an efficiency of §e100%§r and energy output slowly ramps up as §bSteam§r is supplied and slowly goes down as steam cuts out.

The §3Coker Unit§r is a machine that turns oil products into §6Petroleum Coke§r, which is the same to the other kinds of coke, aswell as additional fluids as byproducts. The coker unit will require an external heat source in order to function, similar to the §3Crucible§r.

§2§r§2Alongside the §2§r§2§r§2Electric Arc Furnace, the coker unit is one of the most polluting machines of the mod. It spreads 20 soot per second, making it a dangerous machine to use next to a glyphid nest.

In this modpack, §dApplied Energistics 2§r has been changed to fit in more with §dNTM§r. Many components have been changed to include NTM materials and some machines, like the §3Grinder§r and §3Inscriber§r, have had their functions moved to the §3Shredder§r and §3Press§r. The meteors have also been removed, but §6Skystone§r can still be crafted for building purposes.

This Chapter of the quests has its information derived from the FTB Wiki. If anything else is missing from the quest book, please visit the wiki.

[url]https://ftbwiki.org/Applied_Energistics_2[/url]

§6Certus Quartz§r is an important material in AE2. It is dropped when mining or processing certus quartz ore at the rate of one to four, the yield is affected by a tool's Fortune enchantment. Certus Quartz is often interchangeable with vanilla §6Nether Quartz§r in the recipes for basic tools, such as the §6Quartz Cutting Knife§r. Certus quartz ore can be acidized or centrifuged for an increased yield.

§2Certus quartz can later be made in a Chemical Plant using nether quartz.
The §3Auxiliary Cooling Tower§r is a larger version of the Steam Condenser able to process up to 50 mb/t of §bLow-Pressure Steam§r.

§6Saturnite§r is a very durable, heat-resistant and corrosion-resistant alloy that is commonly used for making stronger gun parts. It is also used to make §6Starmetal§r and is an important component of the §3Watz§r reactor.

The §6Gravity Gun§r is an advanced tool which can lift and throw blocks. It is particularly useful for moving highly hazardous blocks, such as corium from a reactor meltdown, or throwing explosives.

§2The gravity gun can be supercharged in a Cyclotron using Ionized Particles, further increasing its range and power.

Oil products can be combusted or burnt to produce massive amounts of energy.

The §3Industrial Combustion Engine§r combusts fuels, such as §bHeating Oil§r or §bDiesel§r to produce power. Various piston sets exist, which are needed for the engine to work, each one giving its own efficiency bonuses to fuel grades.

The §4§3Turbofan§r is the best place to use aviation type fuels, such as §bKerosene§r, as it provides §e100%§r power efficiency. Be careful not to stand infront of it while its operational!

The §3Combined Cycle Gas Turbine§r is the only generator that can burn gaseous fuels at §e100%§r efficiency. The CCGT uses §3§bEngine Lubricant§r, and produces §bDense Steam§r.

The §3Flare Stack§r is used for burning gasses such as §bUnsaturated Hydrocarbons§r for power, as well as dealing with excess fluids.

The §3Fluid Burner§r is a much more efficient way of producing power from gases. Place a §3Boiler§r ontop and run the §bSteam§r through a turbine to generate power.

Consider installing a §6Muffler§r on some of these machines as they are very loud. Shift-Click on a machine while holding a Muffler to apply.
The§3 Crystal Growth Chamber§r is a machine in which crystals can grow at an increased speed, while also being in a block instead of being dropped in the ground.
The §6Chicken Nugget§r is the best food item in the mod, completely filling up both hunger and saturation. It is made by colliding 2 raw chickens in a §3Particle Accelerator§r.

The §3Pumpjack§r is a more efficient §3Oil Derrick§r which extracts 750mb of §bCrude Oil§r and a random amount of §bNatural Gas§r between 50 and 250mb in a 1.25 second cycle. It depletes a single block of a deposit after extracting a random number of cycles of oil that is on average twice as large compared to the derrick.

In total, this means that the pumpjack is on average 3x as efficient at extracting oil and 3x as fast at doing so while producing the same amount of natural gas as the derrick.

The §3Ore Acidizer§r is a useful machine, used for processing various items for utility, ore multiplication, and more. It is powered by electricity and requires various solvents depending on the item. The acidizer is quite the power hungry machine, consuming §e20kHE/s§r.

The §3Hydraulic Fracking Tower§r is used to extract infinite oil from a §eBedrock Oil Deposit§r. To operate, the machine needs §bFracking Solution§r. During its operation, the surrounding environment will sustain considerable damage. §6Oily Dirt§r and §6Oily Sand§r can be used to create §6Arsenic§r, a substitute of §6Bismuth§r.

Operating the hydraulic fracking tower will consume §e100kHE/s§r.

The §6§3Centrifuge§r allows for the seperation of ores, giving back more items than the usual mining method. It also seperates items into their respective items. Additionally, they are used in processing §e§6Bedrock Ores§r.

Operating the centrifuge will consume §e4kHE/s§r.

The §3Electric Groundpump§r can be used to quickly generate §bWater§r, making it very useful later on for filling large §3Tanks§r and reactors. The pump requires a 3x3 cube of dirt directly beneath it and must be below Y:70, otherwise it won't work.

The §3Boiler§r, when receiving heat from below, heats up fluids. Two important uses of the boiler are for §bSteam§r and §bOil§r processing which will come later on. The Boiler can explode if its output is full.

Steam, when used by machines, such as reactors sending steam through §3Turbines§r or §3Chemical Factories§r produce §bLow-Pressure Steam§r. The low-pressure steam can be recycled back to retrieve 100% of the water by using a §3Steam Condenser§r. Closed water loops are recommended for reactors.

§6Schrabidium§r is a dangerous material, but one which is needed for the creation of other items, such as §6Magnetized Tungsten§r and §6Ferric Schrabidate§r. It also makes for great reactor fuel. It can be created from exposing uranium ore to radiation using either a nuclear weapon or, more easily, by exploding radioactive barrels found in the abandoned nuclear powerplants in deserts.

§2When holding Schrabidium, the player will receive the blindness effect, so it is recommended that a Suit which provides protection from both Bright Lights and Radiation is used.
The §3Industrial Solidification Machine§r is a general use machine for the solidification of various fluids. An important product of this machine is §6Tar§r, which can be used to create §3Tanks§r.
The §3Industrial Liquification Machine§r is a general use machine for the liquifying various items. It becomes very useful for cobblestone generation, and thus §6Silicon§r automation.

The §3Catalytic Reformer§r is an optional late-game oil processing machine. It converts certain oil products into more valuable ones.

The §3Hydrotreater§r is another optional late-game oil processing machine that allows for easier production of §bSour Gas§r, which can also turn §bCrude Oil§r into §bDesulfurized crude Oil§r. 

§2The Hydrotreater requires pressurized Liquid Hydrogen in all its recipes, requiring the use of a Compressor.

The §3Security Terminal§r can be used to specify what players are allowed to interact with in the ME network which can be useful in multiplayer. It can also be used to link a §6Wireless Terminal§r to the ME network. Atleast one §3Wireless Access Point§r is required, and its range can be expanded using §6Wireless Boosters§r.

§3Tanks§r and §3Barrels§r are useful storage devices that can hold various fluids in various amounts. Each tank and barrel supports holding different types of corrosive, hot, or exotic fluids, and knowing which ones can hold your desired fluids can be vital to your fluid processing and storage facilities.

Tanks can hold up to 256,000mb of fluids, while a Steel Barrel can hold 16,000.

§4§2Tanks cant hold highly Antimatter and Corrosive fluids and as such a Big-Ass Tank 9000 or a Magnetic Tank is needed respectively.

The §6Geiger counter§r is a device used to measure §eRAD/s§r, in order to inform the player of any eventual radiation. It is an upgrade to the §6Dosimeter§r. It can measure three different types of radiation, those types being chunk radiation, environmental radiation and player contamination.

It can be used in one of two forms, either as a hand-held item or in its block form.

Holding it in the inventory will show a meter on the bottom left of the screen, and right clicking while holding it will send a message in chat showing the various doses of radiation.

It will also click whenever it reads any kind of radiation, a signature function of any dosimeter.
The §6Survey Scanner§r is a handheld device that will point out underground resourse deposits, such as §eDepth Rock§r and §eBedrock Ores§r.
The §6ME Storage Housing§r is the outer shell of a §6Storage Cell§r. There are many tiers of storage cells, all of which require the use of NTM machines to be crafted.

The §3Solar Tower Boiler§r is an earlygame machine that can use sunlight from heliostat mirrors to boil water and therefore turn i.

The Solar Tower Boiler gets heat from heliostat mirrors pointed at it. Aiming a mirror at the boiler can be done using the mirror adjustment tool, right-click on the boiler will save its position to the tool, and subsequently clicking on mirrors will aim them at the linked boiler. The maximum range for mirrors is 25 blocks, mirror efficiency does not degrade with range. A boiler consumes 1mB of water for every 12.5 mirrors each tick at full sunlight level, and 100mB of steam per mB of water consumed. However, the water consumption rate is rounded down to the millibucket. Thus it takes 13 mirrors to raise your first 100mB/t of steam, 12 mirrors for the next hundred, then 13, 12, and so on.

As the heat provided by each mirror is based on sunlight, mirrors with solid blocks above them will not work, and the amount of heat diminishes with the amount of light in the evening until it produces no heat at night.

The solar tower boiler can only produce regular steam, and thus the liquid type cannot be changed using fluid identifiers.

The §3Nuclear Blast Furnace§r is an RTG-powered alternative to the standard §3Blast Furnace§r. It has 6 slots for RTG pellets, and requires a minimum of 15 heat to operate. It is significantly faster than the regular blast furnace.

Pellets with higher power levels will have a better effect of heating and thus speed. If sufficient heat is provided, it can alloy items near-instantaneously.
The §3Exposure Chamber§r is a machine in which many materials can be created by exposing ingots to certain particles, most important of which being §6Dineutronium§r.

The §3Soyuz-FG Rocket§r is an immensely powerful Soviet rocket that is the primary launch vehicle for all satellites. The rocket must be launched from a suitably large mount - in this case, the §3Soyuz Launch Platform§r.

It requires 128,000mB of §bKerosene§r and §bLiquid Oxygen§r to be launched as well as §e750kHE§r of power. Pressing the launch button starts a 30 second countdown. After the countdown has completed, the Soyuz will launch.

The Soyuz can, alongside its primary ability to deliver any satellite to orbit, also be set to a cargo mode, in which it can deliver any provided cargo to a distant spot across the world. Obviously, this is an incredibly expensive way to transport goods, and currently doesn't provide much utility.

§2Blueprints for the Soyuz can be found in structures or purchased through Bobmazon.

§6Euphemium§r is a fictional material which serves as one of the mod's most endgame materials. It's extremely expensive to produce in large amounts and you will need great advancement through the mod to use it effectively.

§6Dineutronium§r is the mod's (almost) ultimate material. It's a final tier material and is a higher tier than even §6Euphemium§r. It is very difficult to produce and it's used to make the most absurd and broken items this mod has. The only material that is more difficult to make, would be §6Osmiridium§r.

The §c§r§4§r§6Digamma Particle§r is created by colliding a §6Sparkticle Capsule§r with a §6Higgs Boson Capsule§r in a §3Particle Accelerator§r. Making it in the particle accelerator will require §6Chlorophyte Coils§r and momentum of 70,000.

The digamma particle emits a different kind of radiation, §4DRX§r, which currently can only be countered by the use of digamma medication, most notably §6Enteramine Pills§r, which provide full immunity against DRX for 10 minutes. After the §3DFC§r, Fau armor can be crafted which provides full resistance against DRX.
The§3 Murky Anvil§r is the ultimate version of the §3Anvil§r, having all recipes unlocked.

With casting available through the §3Crucible§r, many gun parts can now be created such as §6Barrels§r and §6Grips§r. An §3Ammo Press§r is used to create the various ammunitions guns use.

A §3Weapon Modification Table§r can be used to install weapon mods, such as §6Silencers§r and §6Scopes§r.

The §6Bullet Casing Bag§r will retrieve some of the casings when guns are fired.

The §3Launch Pad§r is the main launch table for most missiles. Although it is the earliest available, missiles must first be erected before launch, resulting in a small delay.

The §3Silo Launch Pad§r is a miniaturized version of the launch pad. It can launch every generic missile with a delay of only 5 seconds. A rusted variant can be found in the naturally-occurring silo structure, holding the damaged Doomsday Missile.

§6Fluix Crystals§r are another crystal type which is used in crafting recipes throughout the mod. The crystal comes in two forms, the regular fluix crystal and the §6Pure Fluix Crystal§r.

To create a fluix crystal, 1§6 Charged Certus Quartz§r, 1 §6Nether Quartz§r, and 1 §6Redstone Dust§r must be dropped into a pool of §bWater§r. They will be consumed and output 2 fluix crystals.

§2Fluix crystals can later be made in a Chemical Plant using charged certus quartz and redstone.
The §6Quantum Processing Unit§r is the first quantum circuit one makes, used in the §3Particle Accelerator§r and §3ICF§r reactor.
An upgraded version of the §3Anvil§r, [T4], which unlocks additional recipes.

The §6Neutrino Lens§r is an armor modification which can detect and highlight special blocks, such as §eBedrock Ore deposits§r, the §6Pink Log§r and §6Alexandrite§r. 

For the lens to work, it must first be linked to a §6Depth-Resource Scanning Module Satellite§r and then inserted into an armor piece using the §3Armor Modification Table§r.

§2The HUD key has to be activated for it to work.

The §3Crystal Growth Accelerator§r is a machine that uses energy to accelerate the process of crystal purification. This process transforms crystal seeds into pure versions of their fully developed counterparts.

The §3ZIRNOX§r is the first and cheapest nuclear reactor that one can make. Unlike the §3PWR§r and §3RBMK§r, it is a fully assembled reactor which requires §bWater§r and §bCarbon Dioxide§r to operate.

Due to the low amount of steam the ZIRNOX makes, one can use the singleblock §3Steam Turbines§r, at the cost of §e85%§r efficiency, and a single §3Steam Condenser§r on lower power fuels. Thus, 24 §6Natural Uranium Fuel Rods§r using 14kmB of carbon dioxide will yield a power output of around §e160kHE/s§r.
The §3Charger§r is a machine which will charge §6Certus Quartz Crystals§r into their charged form at the expense of power.
The §3Cooling Tower§r is a larger version of the §3Auxiliary Cooling Tower§r§r, able to process up to 500 mB/t of §bLow-Pressure Steam§r.

§3Transport Drones§r are flying machines which will transport items and fluids between different containers. The drones require no power, and can transport both up and down. §3Waypoints§r can be used to make a better path for the transport drones to move around.

§6Ionized Particles§r are the main product of the §3Fusion Reactor§r and are used in making §6Ferric Scrabidate§r, as well as some particle capsules needed in the §3Particle Accelerator§r.

§2Ionized Particles can be infinitely produced by utilizing Ionic Gel.

The §6ME Glass Cable - Fluix§r is a cable used to transmit data and energy between devices in an ME Network. It is capable of transmitting §f§e8 channels§r simultaneously.

The §6Quartz Fiber§r is used to transfer energy, but not channels.

§6Cable Anchors§r can be used to seperate ME cable connections. They can also be used to make §6Facades§r for the cables.

The §3Energy Acceptor§r transfers energy into the ME system. In combination with an §3HE to RF Converter§r, the ME system can be powered.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_EnergyAcceptor.png[/img]
The §3ME Terminal§r is used to access all available items in the ME Network, including craftable ones.
The §3ME Drive§r serves as the storage of the ME system, in which §6Storage Cells§r can be put and store items.

The §3ME Interface§r is a block which allows the ME Network to interact with machines and inventories. On their own, they can be used to automatically stock inventories, but can be used with §6ME Patterns§r later on for autocrafting.
The ME Controller acts as the routing hub of an ME network. It can support up to 8 devices connected to it.

The §3ME Export Bus§r is an ME component which is used to export items from the ME network into a machine or other input inventory. 

The §3ME Import Bus§r is an ME component which is used to import items directly into the ME Network from a machine or other output inventory.

§2It is recommended that Interfaces are used over Export/Import buses for performance reasons.

The §6HEV Mark IV§r is a strong electric armor set, with the intent of keeping the user safe primarely from dangerous hazards, such as high levels of radiation, fire, certain air particles and more. The suit comes equiped with an §6Geiger Counter§r and custom hud.

The §3Mining Charge§r is an explosive made with the express purpose of mining, as such it's commonly used to mine depth ores, since it dosen't destroy drops, before getting a pickaxe that can do the same. Mining Charges are a great way of obtaining §6Zirconium§r from depth ores for nuclear fuel rods.

It has an explosion radius of about 3 blocks and explodes instantly upon being powered by redstone, while exploding it does no damage to entities.

There are two other variants of this, being the §3Timed Mining Charge§r and the §b§3Semtex Mining Charge§r, they are both timed explosives with the semtex one being stronger than the regular one and having §eFortune 3§r, meanwhile the timed mining charge does not seem to have enhanced capabilities, other than being timed and thus more convinient to use.

§6Bismuth§r is an important material needed in many advanced crafting recipes. Bismuth can be obtained from either §3RBMK§r fuel depletion and processing though a §3FEL§r and §3SILEX§r, or from bedrock ore processing using §bHigh-Performance Solvent§r. 

§6Arsenic§r will require an additional §bOre Acidizer§r aswell as access to high-performance solvent.

§2Due to the lack of bismuth bedrock ore available on earth and the amount of time it takes to process RBMK fuels, it is recommended that some arsenic is used instead of bismuth.

The §3Research Reactor§r is a non-power reactor intended for burning fuel efficiently and acting as a neutron source for §3Breeding Reactor§ss§r. It has to be submerged in §bWater§r to cool since it does not have the active cooling of a typical power reactor. A §6Ra226Be§r or §6Pu238Be§r neutron source plate is needed to begin the reaction, and then can be removed. It explodes at exactly §e1,000°C§r, so caution is advised when using strong fuels and several breeders simultaneously.

A §3Reactor Remote Control§  Block§r
and a §6Reactor Remote Sensor§r can be used to activate and monitor the reactor from a distance.

The Breeding Reactor breeds isotopes of elements into heavier forms using the neutron flux of an adjacent Research Reactor. When the reactor is operating, rays of green-ish "lightning" emitted from the center rod of the model can be seen going to the outer rods from the glass observation window.

The §3ICF§r reactor is a very expensive and powerful reactor, which can produce a substantial amount of energy. Apart from the multiblock itself, §3ICF Lasers§r must be constructed for the reactor to work. §bStellar Flux§r will be produced during its operation which is needed to craft §6Gerald§r. Consider making use of §bLiquid Lead§r as it is a very efficient coolant for the ICF.

It is recommended that the wiki is checked out as it has built-in calculators for the laser power consumption and the amount of hot coolant it produces.

[url]https://nucleartech.wiki/wiki/Inertial_Confinement_Fusion_Reactor[/url]

§6Tantalium§r is a material needed for the creation of some items, most importantly §6Capacitor Boards§r. Tantalium Polycrystal production requires §6Coltan§r which can be located by the use of a §6Coltass§r. Coltan can also be obtained by using the mining drill in a §eBedrock Ore Coltan Deposit§r located randomly on planet Dres. Tantalum can also be obtained via §3Watz Reactor§r.

§2Coltan Processing at its early stage can provide Niobium needed for Catalytic Cracking Towers.

The §6Welded Technetium/Cadmium Steel Plate§r is the welded varient of the cast technetium/cadmium steel plate and is used in some recipes that require strong materials. 

§2Make sure to have good energy generation and storage infrastructure as each plate costs 1.2 Billion HE.
The §3Big-Ass Tank 9000§r is the largest fluid storage container, capable of storing 2048000mB of fluids, aswell as being able to hold strongly corrosive fluids.

The §3Heavy Magnetic Storage Tank§r is a large version of the §3Magnetic Antimatter Container§r. It will be particularly useful when making §6Gerald§r, as he will need very large quantities of §bStellar Flux§r.

The §3Vacuum Refinery§r is an oil refinery which processes §bPressurized/Desulfurized Crude Oil§r into 4 liquid products. It is a good way to make §bHigh-Performance Solvent§r by using §bReformate Gas§r and §bChlorine Gas§r in an §3Industrial Mixer§r.

§2Compressors are needed for the oil to be inserted inside the Vacuum Refinery.

§bBTX§r is a high-grade powerful fuel which generates a lot of power when burnt. An important use of BTX is in the creation of §6Crystalline Fullerite§r and §6Hard Plastic Bars§r. BTX can be obtained from a §3Hydrotreater§r, but it is more efficient to use §bReformate§r from a §3Vacuum Refinery§r.

The §3Watz§r powerplant is a fission reactor which can produce §bPoisonous Mud§r, an important component of §6CMB Steel§r. Although the reactor is not really powerful in terms of energy output, it can be stacked ontop of eachother for increased mud and power production.

If the poisonous mud buffer reaches its maximum, the reactor will melt down and explode, irradiating a wide area around it and causing fallout to fall in a small area around it. As well as this, it will spew poisonous mud in a very wide area which will then corrode any blocks that it comes in contact with, similar to corium.
§6Magnetized Tungsten§r is the product of combining §6Schrabidium§r and §6Tungsten§r in a §3Blast Furnace§r. It can also be rarely dropped by cybercrabs in §eMeteorite Dungeons§r.
§6Ferric Schrabidate§r is an alloy made from §6Iron§r, §6Ionized Particles§r and §6Schrabidium§r. It can also be used to create schrabidate capacitors, which are a great way of storing energy.
§6Poisonous Mud§r is the byproduct of the §3Watz§r operating. This is the solidified version of it which can be used in a §3Crucible§r to create §6CMB Steel§r.
§6CMB Steel§r is an alloy made from §6Poisonous Mud§r and §6Magnetized Tunsten§r in a §3Crucible§r. This alloy is used in endgame machinery, such as the §3ICF§r and §3DFC§r.
An upgraded version of the §3Anvil§r, [T2], which unlocks additional recipes.

§6Crystalline Fullerite§r is an material which is primarely used in endgame machines, such as the §3ICF§r and the §3FEnSU§r.

§2It is recommended that an Effectiveness 3 upgrade is installed on the Acidizer to increase the chance of not consuming the Fullerene, as fullerite can be expensive to produce large quantities.

The §3Smokestack§r is used to reduce pollution made from machines. §3Exhaust Pipes§r, made in anvils, can be used to transport the fumes to the Smokestack. The §3Industrial Smokestack§r is needed to produce §6Fine Soot§r, required for making §6Fullerite§r in the late game.

An §3Ashpit§r can be installed beneath the Smokestack which will collect §6Ash§r, that can be used as a cheap black dye alternative as well as in the creation of §6Industrial Fertilizer§r.

The §3Electrolysis Machine§r enables the separating of elements from fluids and the advanced processing of ores, making it an important machine in ore processing. Operating the machine consumes §e200kHE/s§r.

The electrolysis machine has 2 functions: one for the separation of fluids and one for ore processing.

In the first mode, the machine will take in a compatible fluid and separate it into 2 other fluids.

In the second mode, it will require §bNitric Acid§r and will process any kind of ore-derived crystal, allowing the maximum yield of the ore. There are 2 outputs, for the molten main product the outlet marked green and the secondary the one marked red, plus a byproduct kept in its item form. The outlets follow the same mechanics as the §3Crucible§r.

§2Consider installing a Power Saving upgrade above level 2 on the electrolysis machine as it will significantly reduce the power consumption with only a minimal speed penalty.
The §6Spark Laser Crystal§r unlocks new recipes, most importantly it is used to create §6Osmiridium§r.

The §6Book of Boxcars§r is an item which allows the crafting of many special items. The book can be found inside §eMeteorite Dungeons§r found randomly in the wilderness on extra-terrestial bodies, indicated by a black pillar, or in §eRed Rooms§r.

The §6Digamma Laser Crystal§r is the fastest and final laser crystal which can be used in a SILEX.

§2If the laser touches any block, the surrounding area will be atomized.
The §3Player Decontaminator§r will remove Rads received while standing on it. It can be very cost efficient, as other methods such as §6RadAways§r require constant replenishment.
An upgraded version of the §3Anvil§r, [T7], which unlocks additional recipes.
The §6Spark Singularity§r is a singularity made from combining all the types of singularities with §6Dineutronium§r.

The §3FenSU§r is the ultimate energy storage block, being able to store 9.22EHE.

[F1] For more information.

§6Gerald the Construction Android§r is the most powerful weapon in the mod. Using this has the side effect of setting the world on fire but also getting tektite, which contains §6Osmiridium§r.

Gerald is the hardest recipe of the mod requiring hundreds of thousands of items, mainly circuit related.

Vast quantities of §6Bismuth§r, §6Tantalium§r and §6Silicon§r are needed, so dont hold back on bedrock ore processing and parallelisation of many processes. If you havent already used §dAE2§r, it is highly recommended at this stage of the game.

Launching Gerald will result in a global firestorm that will decimate all life, including all trees and grass. Make sure to keep a backup of your world before launching him.

§2Blueprints for Gerald and the Orbital Module can be found in structures or purchased from Bobmazon.
§6Osmiridium§r is the second most expensive material and is used primarely in the §3DFC§r.
The §6Yharonite Billet§r is created in a tungsten crate that has §6Polonium Billets§r in it while being shot from a §3DFC Emitter§r. This is the final material obtained in the mod.
The §6Crucible§r is a weapon that deals extreme amount of damage. It can be recharged inside a Tungsten Crate shot by a §3DFC Emitter§r.
The §6Schrabidium Hammer§r is the most powerful weapon in the mod, being able to one-shot everything.

§bHigh-Performance Solvent§r is a solvent which is used in an §3Ore Acidizer§r to further increase the products of bedrock ores, as well as other recipes. It can be created from §bReformate Gas§r, from a §3Vacuum Refinery§r, and §bChlorine§r in an §3Industrial Mixer§r or be obtained from an §3RBMK§r Irradiation Channel.

To transport High-Performance Solvent by hand, a §6Hazardous Material Tank§r is needed.

§2High-Performance Solvent made from an RBMK irradiation channel requires an ore acidizer.
The §6Machine Upgrade Template§r is the baseline for all machine upgrades. Machine upgrades are not only used to increase the efficiency of machines but also to unlock new functions.
The §3Drainage Pipe§r allows the dumping of fluids and gasses into the environment at the cost of pollution.

The §3Radiation-Powered Engine§r turns nuclear waste into decayed waste while also making energy in the process and giving guaranteed consistent decay times.

§2Blueprints can be found in structures or purchased from Bobmazon.
The §3Steam Radiator§r is a steam condenser that works in the vacuum of space.

The §6Control Unit§r is used to create §6CPUs§r and §6Component Buses§r.

The §6Arithmetic Logic Unit§r is used for crafting components that perform calculations, such as CPUs and §6Graphics Cards§r.

§3Barrels§r are storage blocks that can hold both fluids and solid blocks. Wooden barrels will leak liquids over time and burn down if filled with lava, so use a stone barrel for those recipes.

Barrels placed under open sky will collect rainwater during downfall.

When filled with organic material, a barrel will begin composting once completely full. After roughly 100 seconds it produces a dirt block, ejected by right-clicking. Dirt left near mycelium will slowly convert into a mycelium block, no Silk Touch needed.

A wooden barrel filled with §bWater§r placed next to cobblestone will slowly convert it into mossy cobblestone, costing §e100 mB§r per block. The surrounding blocks must be unaffected by rain. Placing a barrel on mycelium converts its water into §5Witch Water§r, though the barrel itself may disappear in the process. Water flowing above a barrel filled with lava transforms into obsidian.

Stone barrels can spawn creatures when tapped with a doll: a barrel of lava with an Angry Doll summons a Blaze, and a barrel of §5Witch Water§r with a Creepy Doll summons an Enderman.

Barrels can convert items using fluids: §5Witch Water§r turns sand into soul sand, lava turns redstone into netherrack or glowstone dust into end stone, and §bWater§r can turn dust into clay, milk into slime balls, or mushroom stew into §5Witch Water§r.

§2Hoppers can be used to insert and eject items from barrels, making composting easy to automate.§r
You killed them all! §cYou're monster!

The §3Sieve§r is a block from §dEx Nihilo§r used to extract ores, seeds, and other materials from raw blocks like dirt, gravel, and sand. Before it can be used, a mesh must be placed inside it.

To operate it, hold a sievable block and right-click the §3Sieve§r to load it, then continue right-clicking until the block is fully processed and items pop out of the top. Each possible drop is rolled independently, so multiple items can result from a single block.

Higher-tier meshes - from §6String Mesh§r up through §6Flint§r, §6Iron§r, and §6Diamond Stiffened Mesh§r - unlock better drop rates and access to rarer outputs. The mesh installed determines what you can sieve and what you will get from it.

§2Check sieve recipes in JEI by viewing the usage of any mesh or sievable material.
§2The Sieve can be automated with any machine that simulates a right-click.
When a §6Tectonic Missile§r hits, it creates a volcano that immediately starts to splash volcanic lava everywhere. Which is what you need to get the volcanic gem!
Instead of using the §bHot Coolant§r for power, one can use it to make the §3Steel Furnace§r go at ludicrous speeds.

§6Uranium-238§r is the most common uranium isotope in the game. 

This material has many uses, some of which are: §6Ferrouranium§r, MOX fuel, depleted uranium ammunition, absorber Pellets for the §3Watz§r powerplant and can also be turned into §6Schrabidium§r later on in the §3Exposure Chamber§r.

The §6Charm of Protection§r diverts meteorites away from the player and prevents them from destoying blocks. It is recommended that one is obtained as soon as possible as to prevent costly damages in the future.
Need some minecraft grade copper? Buy some!

§6Semtex§r is an explosive that is used in conjunction with C-4 in many crafts.

Semtex is used in many crafts of various ammunition and mines, such as the §6Stinger missile§r, §6anti-personnel mines§r, and so on. In all crafts that use Semtex (except, of course, the Semtex block and Semtex bar, as well as the explosive reactive armor plate), it can be replaced with a C-4 bar.

It is used to create the bomb of the same name.

§2Semtex can be eaten, making you feel like a real American soldier.§r

The tool tells you if there is ore detected in your chunk.

Bufka2011 says - "I personally don't like this tool and I am hoping to replace it with the geological hammers in future"

§3Magnetohydrodynamic Turbines§r are advanced components of the fusion reactor that make electricity out of the plasma energy directly without needing additional turbines. While more expensive and requiring §bPerfluoromethyl§r cooling, they have a §e+35%§r convertion bonus from §eTU§r to §eHE§r. In addition, the MDH turbine requires a minimum input of
§e5MTU/t§r of plasma energy to operate normally, otherwise efficiency will be halved.

§6Gallium Arsenide§r is made from mixing §6Gallium§r, which can be procured by processing rich mineral deposits from §eMoho§r or §eIke§r, and §6Arsenic§r which is found on Ike in bedrock ore, or on §eEarth§r via dirt and stone that has been damaged by hydraulic fracking.

§dNTM§r offers a built-in §6Floppy Disk§r for monitoring the §3PWR§r reactor.

§2This quest serves as a guide on how to set up an OC Computer using a PWRangler floppy disk.§r

First of all, an OC computer with OpenOS must be constructed. For the purposes of this quest the computer that will be used will make use of §bTier 3§r components.
