[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_OC2.png[/img]

After booting up the PC, install OpenOS.

Once the PC has been rebooted, switch out the OpenOS floppy disk with the PWRangler one. Once inserted, type §oinstall§r to install the PWRangler on the system.

The PWR needs to be linked to the computer using OC Cables directly on the controller.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_OC3.png[/img]

Finally, type §oPWRangler§r in the computer to start the program.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_OC4.png[/img]

The §3Gas Giant Harvester Station§r is a device for collecting atmospheric air samples from gas giants.

The concept is quite simple: on a planet that is a satellite of the giant (for example, to fly to the green giant Jool, you need to go to Laythe), the station is set up. After refueling with §bLiquid Oxygen§r and §bHydrogen§r, the §3harvester rocket§r is sent for air. In one trip, it delivers 16,000 mB§r. As you can understand, the harvester's§r functionality is completely analogous to the operation of §3MiningModules§r.
The §6Infinity Booster Card§r allows one to access their ME system across any distance and dimension. To apply simply open the §6Wireless Crafting Terminal§r and insert the card in it.

This is something new; don't ask questions like how a cow survives on the Mun without food or where it got a PLSS module. The fact is, they feel quite well on the Mun, and due to the vacuum, the milk inside them has curdled.

The §6Hard Disk Drives§r are a higher tier storage medium in OC.

All storage media perform at the same speed: higher tier storage provides more space. There are also some devices that can only use disk drives (although servers could use an external disk drive, for example). Hard drives can be placed inside a §3Raid§r, allowing multiple drives to share the same file system. Note that placing a hard drive in a raid wipes the drive of its contents.

The §3Diesel Generator§r is a compact, single-block generator that burns liquid fuels to produce energy. Its small footprint and compatibility with common oil-processing byproducts make it a strong choice for early- and mid-game power.

It holds up to §b4,000 mB§r of fluid internally, consumed at a steady rate of §e20 mB/s§r. It also carries a §e50 kHE§r energy buffer - but combustion does not pause when the buffer is full, so any excess energy is wasted. To avoid this, ensure your machines are drawing power consistently.

Fuel can be supplied via fluid ducts or by placing barrels in the internal item slots. A §6Fluid Identifier§r can be inserted to lock the accepted fuel type. Not all fuels are equal - effectiveness varies by grade: medium-grade fuels run at §e50%%§r efficiency, high-grade at §e75%§r, and aviation fuels at just §e10%§r. Low-grade and gaseous fuels are rejected entirely.

§2Tip: High-grade fuels like diesel, gasoline, and biofuel get the best return - prioritize refining your oil into these where possible.§r

The §3Wood-Burning Generator§r is basic method of producing energy by burning wood. It can run on any burnable items but provides burn time bonuses to logs and wood. It can also run on any flammable fuel by clicking on the arrow below the on/off switch, but it is considerably more inefficient than other fluid burning generators.

Burning logs in the generator produces §e2kHE/s.§r
Flint Tools are required to obtain first wood and stone. To get some sticks, break some tree leaves.

§dHunger Overhaul§r makes hunger a genuine threat rather than a mild inconvenience.

Hunger now drains passively over time, even while idle. Reaching zero kills you instantly. Low hunger inflicts slowness, weakness, and reduced mining speed before that point. Eating grants a §6Well Fed§r effect that boosts health regeneration - the larger the meal, the longer it lasts.

Food values are re-balanced by meal size. Raw ingredients restore very little; prepared meals restore substantially more. Larger meals take longer to eat and stack less in your inventory.

Crops only grow during daytime and take much longer to mature. Wood and stone hoes are removed - you need at least an iron hoe to till soil. Farmland must be placed adjacent to water or it will not function.

§dSpice of Life: Carrot Edition§r rewards dietary variety. Each unique food eaten for the first time permanently increases your maximum health. Eating the same food repeatedly provides no bonus.

§2The more diverse your diet, the more hearts you have - build a varied farm as early as possible.§r
Are you okay? Go touch some grass.
A §dNature's Compass§r can be used to easily locate biomes of interest.

The §3Vacuum Solderer§r is a machine that can only function in a vacuum, and produces vacuum circuits. They can be placed into the §3Drive Processor§r to enable it to process higher tier planetary drives.
Screaming doesn't help. You're going in the soup.

The §3Steel Furnace§r, unlike the other furnaces, runs off of §eTU§r. It can also process up to 3 items at a time, but each slot consumes more TU, which makes it slow without a strong heat source. It also has a bonus output for ores and wood, where every smelted item gives §e25%§r to the bonus output meter, which means every 4 items give an extra 5th item for free (§e+15 items from a single stack§r).

A §6Component Bus§r is a server-specific upgrade that allows the server to communicate with more components at the same time, without shutting down. 

Like with §6CPUs§r, higher tier buses provide higher component limits. Higher tier servers are also capable of taking more component buses, allowing for communication with many more components.

The §3Electric Furnace§r is a furnace that is powered by electricity. it is slightly faster than the vanilla furnace without upgrades. it consumes from §e1 kHE/s§r without upgrades up to §e4 kHE/s§r.

Due to it only being slightly faster than the vanilla furnace, it isn't used much beyond early game, but it can be used in automation, if speed isn't the main objective.

§dStorage Drawer Keys§r can be used to modify Drawers in many ways.

The §dDrawer Key locks drawers§r, so no new item types can be inserted into the drawer when its empty.

The §dConcealment Key§r hides the item icon of drawers.

The §dQuantify Key§r shows the item quantities of drawers.

The §dPersonal Key§r protects drawers from other players (outside of claims).

The §6PLSS§r is an armor modification which will allow you to breathe in space. It will only work on airtight sealed suits.

The §6Heavy Boots§r can be used to quickly descend down in low-gravity environments.

§6Bobmazon§r is an in-game shop where players can spend §6Bottle Caps§r to purchase various items such as building blocks, plants, resourses and many more. To purchase items, one must have unlocked the achievements listed below as "Ratings".

§6P2P§r Tunnel or "Point to Point Tunnels" are a versatile configurable system to move items / redstone / power / and fluids from one location to another though an existing ME Network without storage.

Tunnels are §e1 input to N outputs§r. This means you can output to as many points as you want, but only input at a single point per tunnel.

Networks can support any number of tunnels, of any different types, and they all function independently.

ME tunnels can be used to carry channels from one location to another, and can carry up to §e32 channels§r, same as a §6ME Dense Cable§r, while only requiring a single channel per point, making tunnels a very powerful tool to expand me networks, especially over a distance. However with the great flex-ability they give you comes a limitation, the channel of a p2p tunnel cannot be carried by another p2p tunnel, meaning that you cannot nest them recursively.

To configure a P2P tunnel you must first attune the tunnel to carry what you want it to, then you need to configure the outputs to their input. You configure the connections by using the §6Memory Card§r. First Shift+Right Click the input to save it on your memory card, then simply right click the different outputs to store the input onto the outputs. this also sets the type of the output to match the type of the input.

§2An advanced version of the Memory Card can also be made, which interacts with the entire network.

§6Wood§r obtained from a tree farm can be smelted or processed in a §3Combination Oven§r to produce §6Charcoal§r, which has many uses, such as fuel for §3Furnaces§r or even the §3Blast Furnace§r, §6Flux§r or §6Carbon§r in a Crucible for §6Steel§r production, or even §6Gunpowder§r for ammunition.
An upgraded version of the §6Wireless Terminal§r, capable of crafting items on the go.

The §3HE to RF Converter§r will convert energy produced by NTM machines into usuable power for both the §dMatter Energy Network§r and §dOpenComputers§r. It has a very large internal energy buffer, so it is recommended that a Diode is used to limit throughput.

The §3Fusion Reactor Coupler§r turns outgoing plasma energy from a torus into usable §eKyE§r which can then be used to power another torus. Some fuel combinations require this, as the minimum §eKyE§r energy needed to ignite the plasma exceeds what four §3Klystrons§r could deliver.

The §3Fusion Reactor Breeding Chamber§r uses neutron flux from a torus to in order to process materials. It can perform any recipe from an §3RBMK irradiation channel§r, with some additional recipes aswell. The neutron flux is not affected by port sharing rules, and the output level is the same on any side.

The §3Fusion Reactor Collection Chamber§r increases the byproduct production rate by §e50%§r.

§eIke§r, the sole moon of §eDuna§r, has hints of a past as a significant hazardous waste dump, with large spires and pyramids reminiscent of potential designs on Earth for warning future civilizations of great danger in relation to nuclear waste. §eMeteor dungeons§r spawn more frequently here, and pools of §bAlkyl Bromide§r can be found on the surface.
The Air Liquefaction Tower is intended for obtaining liquid nitrogen from compressed air.
The §3P2P Interface§r is a P2P device which can be used to easily paralellize recipes across many machines.
The §3Drive Processor Tier 3§r allows for travel to §eLaythe§r.
§6Microchips§r are one of the most important components of future circuits and will be used in bulk throughout progression.
The §6Multi Fluid Identifier§r is used to select the type of fluid one needs. Shift-Click while holding it to select a fluid.
§6Desh Stamps§r have infinite durability, perfect for automation.

§cNTNH§r is a modular modpack, so you are free to add/remove/modify config/mods if it works!

§dNTM§r offers a very modular config file, which also comes with additional modes one can activate. These can be enabled in the hbm.cfg file.

§2528 Mode§r introduces gates in the form of templates which are unlocked by destroying a certain amount of items in an §3Annihilator§r. Additionally, some items, mainly circuits, are percentage based now to be crafted. Along with that, theres also more changes that make the game harder, such as §6Tantalum§r generating in a certain area, landmines spawning more frequently and all §dAE2§r blocks §4EXPLODE§r when used.

Many recycling probabilities of the §3Precision Assembler§r are massively lowered with expensive mode enabled, increasing effective cost massively.

§2Rampant Mode§r makes glyphids a very big threat as pollution now makes them way stronger and more aggresive. New more destructive types of glyphids will also become more common. The §3Radial Performance Engine§r is a combustion generator that converts liquid fuels into electrical power. It requires a minimum of §e3§r §6Combustion Engine Pistons§r to run, with up to §e9§r installed in its piston slots. Additional pistons increase both power output and fuel consumption linearly.

The engine accepts fuels of varying grades at different efficiency rates. §bHeating Oil§r and §bIndustrial Oil§r burn at §e75%§r efficiency, §bPetroil§r at §e50%§r, and §bDiesel§r and §bGasoline§r at §e25%§r. Aviation fuels and gaseous fuels are not compatible. Power is output from the bottom face, and the engine stores up to §e250 kHE§r internally, or §e2.5 MHE§r when running §bNITAN§r.

However, the engine is most efficient with the heaviest, least-refined feedstocks. Lighter refined fuels produce less power per mB despite their higher grade.

§2The listed efficiency is a multiplier on each fuel's base combustion energy. Higher-grade fuels may have higher base energy, so check the HE/t display in the GUI before settling on a fuel.

The §3CO2 Scrubber§r is a mechanism for cleaning air in sealed environments under increased pressure.

The device absorbs §bCarbon Dioxide§r from the surrounding air and collects it. It only works if two conditions are met: the room is sealed and isolated, and the air pressure is elevated (above 1.0 atm). The latter can be achieved by adding a stream of §bOxygen§r from the ventilation to the Earth's air (resulting in a total pressure of 1.1 atm).

§2The maximum number of scrubbers in a room is 5; any additional units placed will not collect carbon dioxide.§r

The §3Firebox§r and the §3Heating Oven§r are machines capable of producing heat (§eTU§r) from solid fuels for any machines that require heat to operate.

Both machines are similar in operation. In order for them to transfer heat, another machine for receiving the heat must be placed on top, such that the copper heat plate on the receiving machine sits on top of the copper heat plate of the heat producing machine.

Once constructed, these machines can be filled with solid fuel, which will burn until either the fuel runs out, or the heat buffer is filled. No fuel will be consumed if its buffer is full — as such, both machines are fairly efficient at conserving fuel.

The primary difference in these two machines lie in their speed: the firebox burns fuel much slower at full efficiency, whilst the heating oven produces five time the heat (but eight times faster). Despite its inefficiency, the heating oven is often preferred for its much higher heat outputs and heat capacity. However, it cannot heat a stirling engine, as its base output (500 TU/t) will automatically over-speed the engine; the heavy stirling engine does not have this issue.

Additionally, the heating oven can receive heat from other heat producing machines placed underneath it: multiple can be stacked for heat-hungry machines like the crucible. The heat received, however, is halved when transferring to the machine above.

A §3Quantum Network Bridge§r is a multiblock structure that connects 2 potentially distant, or even in different dimensions, network fragments together. Created by crafting 8 §3ME Quantum Ring§r and a §3ME Quantum Link Chamber§r and placing the ME quantum link chamber in the center, and sourrounding it in the 8 ME quantum rings.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Qring1.png[/img]

Each quantum network bridge requires power to function. This power must be provided from the network fragment it is attached to until the bridge is linked; at which time power from either side will be available. However if power is lost, connectivity will fail and power will be drained from the side the bridge is on in attempt to restore connection.

To establish a link between 2 quantum network bridges, you must create a pair of §6Quantum Entangled Singularities§r. One of each will be placed inside of a particular connection. Each Bridge may only connect to one other bridge.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/QB_Qring2.png[/img]

AE2 Singularities are created by dumping 256k of any block inside a §3Matter Condenser§r. Singularities can become quantum entangled by dropping a singularity and ender dust and then exploding them together.

The §3Chicago Pile§r is a crude early-game breeding reactor meant to produce §6Plutonium§r for use as reactor fuel.

A pile is composed of drilled §6Graphite§r which can hold a variety of items in it, including radioisotope rods (§6Uranium§r, §6Radium§r, §6Plutonium§r), §6Lithium rods§r, and control rods. It does not behave as a unified single block, instead each individual piece of drilled graphite interacts with each other piece in a unique way depending on the rod it contains.

After sufficient flux, the uranium rods in the Chicago Pile will transmute into plutonium rods that can be processed in an anvil into §6Reactor Grade Plutonium§r which can be used in other reactors such as the §3ZIRNOX§r and §3RBMK§r.

The chicago pile requires a significant amount of graphite blocks, which once placed can be drilled into with the hand drill to place any rod into. 

The §6Hand Drill§r can be used to drill holes into the graphite or take core samples of the uranium fuel to determine heat, depletion, and neutron flux. §6Screwdrivers§r are used to extract rods.

The Quest asks for a 3x3 Chicago Pile (without the corners) with a §6Ra226Be§r Rod in the center surrounded by Uranium Rods.

It can also make §6Charcoal§r at double the speed. It can also collect Ashes from burnt fuel.

The §3Iron Furnace§r has the base smelting speed §e20%§r faster than the vanilla furnace, which means it can complete an operation within 8 seconds instead of 10 seconds. Besides being able to smelt faster, it consumes fuel only during operation, so the fuel is never wasted. It also has burn time bonuses for various kinds of fuel, ranging from §e+25%§r for lignite to §e+100%§r for solid fuel.

§dEt Futurum Requiem§r also backports modern furnaces, such as the §3Smoker§r, which cooks food faster, and the §3Blast Furnace§r, which smelts ores faster.

It is designed for extracting magma from Moho, which, as known, is abundant on this planet both on the surface and in caves. Magma is output through casting channels into molds. Cooled magma forms Vulcanite, which should then be processed to obtain useful resources.

In addition to volcanite, the device extracts regular slag (much more than Vulcanite).
The §3Molecular Assembler§r is used to autocraft anything that can be made in a crafting table.

The §3Orbital Station Computer§r, when having a drive inserted into it, can move the station to its destination.

§3Thrusters§r with fuel are required to be attached to the station.
Delicious squid. We're making Tom Yum seafood.

The §3Spent Fuel Pool Drum§r is used to cool down hot nuclear fuel rods for the §3RBMK§r, §3ZIRNOX§r and §3PWR§r. It has 12 slots.

The drum needs to have atleast one of its sides touching §bWater§r to work. The more sides that have water the faster the fuels inside will cool down.
The §3ICF Laser Turbocharger§r can be placed next to §3ICF Laser Capacitors§r to increase the laser's power by a substantial amount, allowing for the §3ICF§r to run higher grade fuels.
§6Technetium-99§r is a common waste product from the fission of §6Uranium§r and §6Plutonium§r. It is mainly used in making §6Technetium Steel§r and §dAE2 Storage Components§r.

The §3Alkylation Unit§r is designed to convert lighter hydrocarbons into useful heavier hydrocarbon products. From §bNatural Gas§r it can produce §bUnsaturated§r and §bAromatic hydrocarbons§r, commonly used for §6Rubber§r and §6Bakelite§r, and even produce §bBTX§r via the use of §bHigh-Performance Solvent§r. As a utility, it can also alkylate §bPetroleum Gas§r into §bLight Oil§r.
§dModern Markings§r adds wall and floor decorations suited for many purposes. Use the §6Chisel§r on the floor or wall signs to change their design.
They shoot you with explosive fireballs but they are weak when you hit them or knock the fireballs back with a weapon. Better upgrade your armor with fire and blast protection.

The §3Compressor§r is a specialized multiblock machine for compressing fluids. It can perform this operation on any fluid to increase its pressure, for use in other machines. Some of these fluids are compressed into different fluids entirely as special recipes for this machine.

Balls-O-Tron is the second boss of §dNTM§r. It can be summoned by interracting the mechanist's circle, found in the §eEnargite Temple§r which spawns in jungles, with a §6Silver Key§r, made using the Maskman Coin, or from crafting the Balls-O-Tron spawn item.

Due to the outdated nature of the bosses, aswell as the RNG needed to obtain some of the items, this quest provides an alternative way of obtaining the Balls-O-Tron coin.

§2This quest can be repeated.
This modpack makes it possible to complete the entire game in §6Martian mode§r! If you notice any gaps in the progression or logic, please post in the #help channel on the NTNH Discord server.

§6Oily Sand§r is a surface-level block that generates among normal sand, typically in deserts. It acts as a marker for §bBedrock Oil§r deposits directly beneath it - if you find it, there is oil underground.

It can be ground in a §3Grinder§r into §6Oil Waste§r, which can then be processed to obtain §6Arsenic§r.

§2Oily Sand patches are the most reliable way to locate Bedrock Oil without digging blindly.§r
Uh, fancy teleport pearls. You need them. All of them. Now!

The Crafting CPU is a multiblock structure composed of §3Crafting Co-Processing Units§r and §3Crafting Storage§r. When placed next to eachother they form one CPU which is used when placing orders via §3Interfaces§r. The more crafting co-processing units the more tasks the CPU can do in parallel while more crafting storage allows for bigger orders to be made.

The §6Cable§r serves as a way of connecting computers and machines that are far apart. If you have a compact build where all components touch each other (directly or indirectly, most blocks also behave the same way as cables) you will usually not need cables.

The §3Power Converter§r serves as the fastest way to convert energy from other mods' power systems to OpenComputers' internal energy. Placing an §3HE to RF Converter§r next to the PC will also work.

The §3Capacitor Stores§r energy to be used by the network, acting as an energy buffer when needed. It is very useful for tasks that demand a lot of energy, such as assembling or charging devices such as robots and drones.
The §6Jetpack§r can be used to travel upwards. It can be upgraded to unlock additional abilities, and can be equiped as an armor modification.
§6Solid Fuel§r is a compact solidified petroleum product with superior burn time and heat output compared to coal. Essential for advanced furnace operations and rocket propulsion systems.
§6ME Patterns§r are used to encode recipes to be used in §3Interfaces§r. They can be encoded in a §3Pattern Terminal§r.
Arrows are nice, if you shoot them. If one hits you, well, bad things happen.

§6The Nether§r is §c§lACTUALLY HOT§r causing your skin to burn.

§6Fire Proximity Armor Set§r is essential for your first Nerther trip, as it protects you from burning fire.
The §6Network Visualisation Tool§r is used to visuallize an ME Network by right-clicking on any of its blocks, making it very useful when making a large network, especially one that uses §3P2P§r.

The §6Building Wand§r allows one to place many blocks at once, making walls and roads easier to construct. The stronger material the wand is made out of, the more blocks it can place.

§2To replace water blocks using wands bind the key, Change Fluid Mode, in settings.

§eSubnetworks§r are ME networks which can be accessed from a §eMain Network§r. In §dNTM§r§r they can be useful for storing items from passive processes without flooding the main storage network.

§2This quest serves as a guide on how to set up a subnet, which can be used to store the resourses that Bedrock Ore Processing produces.§r

In the image below are two ME networks, the §cRed§r one as the §cMainnet§r, and the §9Blue§r one as the §9Subnet§r.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/BQ_NET1.png[/img]

For the purposes of this quest, the main network will store dirt blocks, while the subnet will store copper blocks.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/BQ_NET2.png[/img]

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/BQ_NET3.png[/img]

To make the contents of the subnet, the copper blocks, visible to the main net, one must make an §3Interface§r-§3Storage Bus§r§r combo. The storage bus must be on the side of the main network.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/BQ_NET4.png[/img]

Make sure to filter the main network storage bus, and to also make it "Extract Only".

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/BQ_NET5.png[/img]

Now the main network has access to materials stored on the sub network, which can be used for crafting.

[img height=1000]betterquesting:textures/BQ_NET6.png[/img]

The §3Microgravity Algae Film§r is a machine is made of specialized layers of laythe plants that will convert §bCarbon Dioxide§r directly into §bLiquid Oxygen§r. They however only function when in orbit.

The §3CO2 Scrubber§r allows you to recover carbon dioxide from a pressurized room. This is occasionally useful when building space stations.

§dRandomThings§r adds §cBlood Moons§r, semi-rare events where mob spawning is increased and the player cant sleep. Blood Moons can be quite useful, if one is prepared, as rare mob drops such as §6Launch Codes§r and §6Geiger Counters§r can be obtained early on.
Now you are ready to fully begin your journey in this modpack! Happy gaming!
§2This quest provides an optional retrieval task for a small laser capable of running Helium-4 - Hydrogen Fuel at 15MHE.§r
Be mean.
Satelites in NTM space can be launched from either a Souyz or a custom rocket.

§dArchitectureCraft§r introduces the §3Architect's Workbench§r which can be used to change the shapes blocks.

The §6Architect's Hammer§r can be used to easily rotate the blocks.

The §6Architect's Glowbrush§r can be used to apply light to any block.

Be wary, they like to disguise and clone themselves in stone-related blocks! (Applies to Vanilla blocks only) Can be found within dungeons and hills. Can also be found in Drowning Creeper spawned cobblestone blocks.

§3Pneumatic Pipes§r are an instant form of item transportation which can cover large distances. The pipes must have a compressed gas inside them to work.

A §6Screwdriver§r is needed to create a connection, and right clicking on the connection with a fluid id will set the gasseous fluid it will use.

§6Graphite§r is a crystalline carbon allotrope, consisting of stacked layers of graphene. Graphite is the most stable form of carbon, and is useful in many environments. It's ability to moderate neutrons makes it indispensable for §3nuclear reactors§r that rely on thermal neutrons to maintain criticality. It's ability to withstand high temperatures and electrical conductivity make it useful as electrodes in the §3Arc Furnace§r and §3Arc Welder§r.

The Martian Invasion Ship is a late-game boss which is killed to get the §6UFO Coin§r, used in crafting Gerald.

This quest provides an alternative way of obtaining the coin.

§2This quest can be repeated.
After collecting a couple of those wither skeleton heads, you feel like you could use some more action. So why not kill a wither?
Trade four LV3 lootbags to get a better one: LV4.

§dFindIt§r is a utility mod that helps you locate items stored across your base. Hover over any item in your inventory or §dNEI§r and press §6T§r to highlight every container holding that item.

You can also check where do mobs spawn by pressing §6F7§r.
Need some steel? Buy some!
§6Ferrouranium§r is an alloy of §6Uranium-238§r and §6Steel§r.

The §6Oil Reservoir Detector§r will help one in the search for an §eOil Deposit§r by pointing it out in chat. If the oil deposit is located very far away, it can be mined and moved to a stationary oil refinery.

The §4§3Heat Exchanging Heater§r is used to cool down coolants used in reactors while also genearting §eTU§r. A §3Boiler§r can be placed ontop of it to heat up other fluids, such as §bSteam§r, to be used in §3Steam Turbines§r.

The §3Teleporter§r can be used to teleport players, and entities in general, to a specific location.

Right-click a block with the §6Telelinker§r to set the desired exit position, then shift-click the teleporter with the telelinker to configure the teleporter.

§2The teleporter is a one way trip so it is advised that multiple are made.

Interdimensional teleportation using teleporters requires a very expensive type of fuel, so it is recommended that other teleportations methods are used, such as AE2 Spatial.

This planet has some of the most prized resources in the whole system, with even the primary fraction of bedrock ore consisting of incredibly valuable metals and materials. §6Niobium§r, §6Coltan§r, and §6Lanthanium§r ore is present here in vast quantities.

For greater distances, and improved aesthetics, a new distribution node is available, the §3Large Electricity Pylon§r.

§3Substations§r are needed to step up/down the voltage that the line carries.

These Pylons can prove useful as favorable §eBedrock Ore§r or §eOil deposits§r may be located far away from the main base.

With access to §6Tantalium§r for §6Control Units§r and fissile matterials, it is possible to assemble a nuclear bomb. To detonate the bomb one can use a detonator or a redstone signal.

A nuclear explosion will transform ores into more valuable ones, such as §6Coal§r to §6Diamonds§r or §6Uranium§r to §6Schrabidium§r. Be prepared with radiation resistant armor before venturing into the crater.

Make sure to stand behind some strong cover if you wish to see the explosion from close by.

§2This quest serves as a list of components needed for various bombs. Some of these components can be mounted onto rockets that will carry the payload over large distances.
Enables remote access to StarDar.

The §6Chlorine Pinwheel§r is a yellow propeller capable of producing chlorine indefinitely.
Acquisition

It cannot be crafted, but can be found in structures (e.g., in a starship).

The chlorine spinner is an endless source of §bChlorine§r; to use it, simply place it in a container slot (e.g., in a barrel). The item will produce chlorine indefinitely, although the production rate is low (1 mb/t or 20 mb/s).

The §6Oxygen Pinwheel§r is analogous to the Chlorine Pinwheel, producing §bOxygen§r instead of §bChlorine§r.

The §3Precision Assembly Machine§r is a machine which can produce §6Blueprints§r. Due to the recipes having a low success rate, automation of the ingredient is recommended.

Pufferfish can be obtained from throwing §6Fishing Dynamite§r in water.

§6Arsenic§r is a substitute of §6Bismuth§r which can be made from acidizing §6Oily Dirt§r, found near §ebedrock oil deposits§r or from the environmental damage the §3Fracking Tower§r does, with §bHigh-Performance Solvent§r.

A strange world, similar to §eEarth§r, where life is different because the vegetation, the only form of life there, is made of complex polymers, like rubber§r and plastic§r.

Tekto bedrock ore doesn’t have the non-metal variant; instead, it is replaced by the plastic variant, from which the player can obtain §6Polymer§r, §6Rubber§r, §6Semtex§r and §6PVC§r.

The formation of a volcano is driven by the §3volcanic core§r, a block that continuously erupts §blava§r, allowing the volcano to grow. The §blava§r cools quickly, turning into §6basalt§r or §6basaltic ore§r.

The resulting volcano grows quite slowly, reaching about 60 blocks in height over 20-30 minutes.

§bVolcanic lava§r differs from §bregular lava§r not only in appearance. It "melts" any non-explosion-resistant blocks, so the volcano can extend underground.

§6Basaltic ores§r (§6asbestos§r, §6sulfur§r, §6fluorite§r, §6molysite§r) form when the §blava§r cools, each with a 0.5% chance.

§6Volcanic gem ore§r spawns with a 5% chance if the following conditions are met:
- All 6 blocks around the cooling §blava§r are §6basalt§r or §blava§r;
- The block 10 blocks above the cooling §blava§r is §6basalt§r or §blava§r;
- There are fewer than 3 §blava§r blocks around the cooling §blava§r.

The §6ore§r also forms after §bvolcanic lava§r contacts §6diamond ore§r.
This means §6volcanic gems§r most often appear near the §3core§r or §3crater§r of the volcano.

§3Forming a Radioactive Volcano§r
If the §3volcanic core§r is exposed to radioactive fallout (e.g., after a nearby nuclear explosion) for some time, the §3core§r will begin generating new §bvolcanic radioactive lava§r (yellow in color), ultimately leading to the formation of a so-called §3radioactive volcano§r. Such a volcano will consist not of §6basalt§r but of various types of §6quenched sellaphite blocks§r and §6sellaphite ores§r. The §blava§r will convert §6diamond ores§r into §6radioactive gem ore§r.

While it is possible to travel here with only a tier 2 drive processor to exploit the incredibly powerful schrabidic resources that exist here, players will not last long without the appropriate armor inserts, due to the highly corrosive atmosphere melting any armor it comes into contact with.

The §3Vehicle Assembly Base§r is a structure which is one of the most vital parts of your space-faring efforts. It'll allow you to stack your rockets and plan out each segment of your journey. Note that each rocket stage allows for one launch from a celestial body to another, so a two-stage rocket can make a round-trip between, say, the Earth and the Mun.

The §3Rocket Launch Pad§r is the only launch pad capable of supporting the various fuel loads and complex requirements of the stacked rockets. This is the only way to fuel up a rocket too, so you'll want to make multiple stages for launching from bodies without a pad. The pad itself has a GUI that'll indicate what your rocket requires to be launched.
The §dSignPicture§r mod allows one to put any image on a sign, opening the door to many unique building designs. Press \ to get started.

The §3Crucible§r is a block from §dEx Nihilo§r used to melt solid blocks down into fluids. It is crafted first as an §6Unfired Crucible§r from §6Porcelain Clay§r, then fired in a furnace to produce a usable §3Crucible§r.

To operate it, place the §3Crucible§r above a heat source and right-click it with an eligible block to load it. The block will slowly melt into fluid over time. The speed of melting depends entirely on the heat source below - stronger heat sources melt faster. Burning §6Netherrack§r is among the most efficient vanilla options.

The primary output is §blava§r, produced by melting cobblestone, stone, and similar blocks. The §3Crucible§r can hold fluids indefinitely, making it a cheap fluid storage vessel in a pinch. Drain it using fluid pipes connected to its side or bottom.

§2A bank of Crucibles over burning Netherrack is a reliable early lava farm for fuel
and power production.
§2Check NEI for all valid heat sources and their melt rates.

§6Weapon steel§r is a steel alloy made by further refining steel in a §3Rotary Furnace§r. As its name implies, it is used in the crafting of weapons and ammunition. It is the next tier of weapons grade alloy after §6Gunmetal§r.
§6Welded Osmiridium Plates§r cost 300 Billion §eHE§r to produce, so good energy generation and storage infrastructure is needed.
A very valuable gemstone that is used to create a §6Cast Pickaxe§r, §6Meteorite Talisman§r, §6Black Diamond§r, §6Composite Euphemium Plates§r and §6Special 227mm Shells§r.

Tired of using buckets to give water to your machines? Try using water pumps or infinite water tanks!

Infinite Water Tank will give 50mb/t
Enhanced Infinite Water Tank will give 500mb/t
Pump will give 1000mb/t but requires steam to operate.
§bHydrazine§r is a powerful rocket fuel which is needed to operate a §3Drop Pod§r.
The §6Overflow Void Card§r acts as a voiding upgrade for AE2 §6Storage Cells§r. It can be added to a storage cell using the §3Cell Workbench§r.

The §3Rocket Transporter Station§r is essential for sending and receiving cargo between celestial bodies.

§3Transport rockets§r, similar to §3resource modules§r or §3Gas Giant Harvesters§r, automatically move various cargoes. To make the system work, you need at least one pair of linked platforms§r.

The platforms have compartments for outgoing and incoming items (blue and orange, respectively)§r, and they can handle liquids with §3dedicated buffers§r.

To link platforms, Shift+Right-Click with the §6Rocket Transporter Connector§r on one platform to save it, then Right-Click on another platform. To open the linker interface§r, Right-Click on a platform with the connector: it will display information about the linked platforms' locations.

To designate one of these points as the receiving point, click the button at the beginning of the row§r.

To launch the transporter rocket§r, the station must be fueled with §bliquid oxygen§r and §bhydrogen§r.

A fair-dinkum planet, hot as hell, and full of rare resources generally only found in the Nether. §6Australium§r is only found here, in vast quantities deep under the surface. Some of the largest caves ever generated within Minecraft can be found here.

The §3Deuterium Extraction Tower§r is a much larger version of the Deuterium Extractor, making it an easy and viable way of making cheap fuel for the §b§r§3Fusion Reactor§r.

§2A Ferrouranium Anvil is required.§r

§6Silkworms§r are items from §dEx Nihilo§r and the primary way to produce §6String§r on resource-limited maps. They cannot be crafted - the only way to obtain one is as a rare drop when breaking leaves with a §6Crook§r.

To use a §6Silkworm§r, right-click it onto any leaves block. The leaves will slowly become infested, turning white over time, and the infestation will spread on its own to adjacent leaves. Fully white leaves produce more §6String§r than partially infested ones, so it is worth waiting.

Once the leaves are fully infested, break them with a §6Crook§r or your fist to collect §6String§r and additional §6Silkworms§r, keeping the process renewable. Note that infested leaves do not drop saplings or apples, so keep spare saplings set aside before
infesting a tree.

§2Cook Silkworms in a furnace for a small food source in a pinch.
§2Silkworms can also be composted in a Barrel if you have a surplus.

A §3Keyboard§r is needed to type text on §3Screens§r, be they in the world or built into devices such as §3Robots§r or §6Tablets§r.

For the keyboard to work with a screen in the world, it has to be placed next to the screen, facing that screen, or placed directly on the screen (on top or on one of the sides).

The §6EEPROM§r is what contains the code used to initialize a computer when it is being booted. 

This data is stored as plain byte array, and may mean different things to different §6CPU§r architectures. For example, for Lua it is usually a small script that searches for a file systems with an init script, for other architectures it may be actual machine code.

An §6OpenOS Disk§r can be crafted using an empty floppy disk and a manual.

The §3Mining Laser§r is a laser drill which can be used to quickly dig large areas. It has a §e100 MHE§r internal power buffer and a 64,000mB internal §bCrude Oil§r buffer. Its default radius is 3, which can be increased by the use of an effectiveness upgrade. It can also be equiped with various upgrades to unlock new functions such as shredding or voiding.

Walking around the world, you can find a §6Mustard Willow§r on dead or §6Oily Dirt§r. The willow itself will not be needed anytime soon, but it is better to collect it and the soil underneath it.

§6Industrial Hemp§r is used to craft ropes, strings and biomass.
